Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 Composition of enriched profunctors

 In this file, we define the composition of enriched profunctors. Given enriched profunctors
 `P : E₁ ↛e E₂` and `Q : E₂ ↛e E₃`, their composition is defined to be the profunctor that
 sends objects `x : E₁` and `z : E₃` to the enriched coend `∫^{y : E₂} P x y ⊗ Q y z`. Note
 that we need to assume that the category `V` over which we enrich, is cocomplete. Concretely,
 we take the following steps to define the composition.
 1. First we define the functor over which we take the coend ([comp_enriched_profunctor_coend]).
    This functor is defined for every `x : E₁` and `z : E₃`.
 2. Since we assume `V` to be cocomplete, we can take the coend ([comp_enriched_profunctor_ob]).
    We also define suitable accessors for the projections and the universal property.
 3. The left action and right action are defined via the universal property of the coend.
    To prove the laws, we again use the universal property of the coend, but this time the
    uniqueness of maps from the coend.

 There are two interesting technical aspects in this proof. First of all, there is a
 constraint of the universe levels of the involved enriched categories `E₁` and `E₂` and
 the monoidal category `V`. Colimits indexed by objects and by morphisms in `E₁` and `E₂`
 need to exist in `V`, which means that `E₁` and `E₂` must be sufficiently small compared
 to `V`. In the literature, one defines the composition for profunctors over small categories,
 and this is reflected in the universe level constraints for the involved categories.

 Secondly, when we define the left action and right action, we need to give a morphism from
 `E₃ ⦃ z₂ , z₁ ⦄ ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x` to `comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x`
 for all `z₁ z₂ : C₃` and `x : C₁` and similar for the right action. However, in order to
 use the universal property of the coend, the domain of the morphism should instead be
 `comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x`, so, more concretely, we would give a morphism
 `comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x --> E₃ ⦃ z₂ , z₁ ⦄ ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x`.
 For this reason, the left action and the right action are defined using suitable transposes.
 Note that if we were to use whiskered bifunctors instead, then we would be asked to give
 `E₃ ⦃ z₂ , z₁ ⦄ --> comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x`,
 and then we would still need to do some work before we can use the universal property of
 the coend.

 Content
 1. The functor over which we take the coend
 2. The coend used to define composition
 3. The left action
 4. The right action
 5. The data
 6. The laws
 7. Composition of enriched profunctors
 8. Additional laws for action on morphisms

 ******************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coends.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.OppositeCategory.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.BenabouCosmos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Profunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Coend.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Closed.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Import MonoidalNotations.

Opaque sym_mon_braiding.

Section Composition.
  Context {V : benabou_cosmos}
          {C₁ C₂ C₃ : category}
          {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
          {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
          {E₃ : enrichment C₃ V}
          (P : E₁ ↛e E₂)
          (Q : E₂ ↛e E₃).

  (** * 1. The functor over which we take the coend *)
  Section CoendProfunctor.
    Context (z : C₃)
            (x : C₁).

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_profunctor_data E₂ E₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_profunctor_data E₂ E₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
C₂ → C₂ → V
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ x₁ x₂ y : C₂,
V ⟦ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ ?P x₁ y, ?P x₂ y ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ x0 y₁ y₂ : C₂,
V ⟦ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ ?P x0 y₁, ?P x0 y₂ ⟧

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
C₂ → C₂ → V
 exact (λ y₁ y₂, P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂).
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ x₁ x₂ y : C₂,
V
⟦ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  ⊗ (λ y₁ y₂ : C₂, P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂) x₁ y,
(λ y₁ y₂ : C₂, P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂) x₂ y ⟧
 exact (λ _ _ _,
               mon_rassociator _ _ _
               · (lmap_e P _ _ _ #⊗ identity _)).
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ x0 y₁ y₂ : C₂,
V
⟦ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  ⊗ (λ y₁0 y₂0 : C₂, P y₁0 x ⊗ Q z y₂0) x0 y₁,
(λ y₁0 y₂0 : C₂, P y₁0 x ⊗ Q z y₂0) x0 y₂ ⟧
 exact (λ _ _ _,
               sym_mon_braiding _ _ _
               · mon_lassociator _ _ _
               · (identity _ #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding _ _ _ · rmap_e Q _ _ _))).
    Defined.

    
V: benabou_cosmos

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_profunctor_laws
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend_data

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_profunctor_laws
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend_data

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ x0 y : C₂,
enriched_id E₂ x0 #⊗ identity (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x0, x0 ⦄) (P x0 x) (Q z y)
   · lmap_e P x0 x0 x #⊗ identity (Q z y)) =
mon_lunitor (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y)
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ x0 y : C₂,
enriched_id E₂ y #⊗ identity (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y)
   · mon_lassociator (P x0 x) (Q z y) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
   · identity (P x0 x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y y)) =
mon_lunitor (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y)
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ x₁ x₂ x₃ y : C₂,
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ x ⊗ Q z y)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ x) (Q z y)
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x ⊗ Q z y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ x) (Q z y)
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (P x₂ x) (Q z y)
   · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y))
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ x0 y₁ y₂ y₃ : C₂,
enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃
#⊗ identity (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
     (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P x0 x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
   · identity (P x0 x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₃)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y₁)
      · mon_lassociator (P x0 x) (Q z y₁)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · identity (P x0 x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
     (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y₂)
   · mon_lassociator (P x0 x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
   · identity (P x0 x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃))
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ x)
        (Q z y₁)
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P x₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P x₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P x₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P x₁ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
      · mon_lassociator (P x₁ x) (Q z y₁)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · identity (P x₁ x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ x) (Q z y₂)
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₂))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ x0 y : C₂,
enriched_id E₂ x0 #⊗ identity (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x0, x0 ⦄) (P x0 x) (Q z y)
   · lmap_e P x0 x0 x #⊗ identity (Q z y)) =
mon_lunitor (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y)
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
enriched_id E₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
enriched_id E₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₂) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
enriched_id E₂ y₁
#⊗ (identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₂))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₂) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
· (enriched_id E₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₂) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
· ((enriched_id E₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
   #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
· (enriched_id E₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₂) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
· mon_lunitor (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₂) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
   · mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
· mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (I_{ V} ⊗ (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂))
· mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

        apply id_left.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ x0 y : C₂,
enriched_id E₂ y #⊗ identity (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y)
   · mon_lassociator (P x0 x) (Q z y) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
   · identity (P x0 x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y y)) =
mon_lunitor (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y)
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
enriched_id E₂ y₂ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₂ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₂)) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
enriched_id E₂ y₂ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₂ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₂)) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
?b = mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

#⊗ (identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₂))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₂) = ?b

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· (identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₂))
  #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y₂
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₂) = ?b

sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· ((identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₂))
   #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y₂
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₂ ⦄)
      · identity (P y₁ x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₂))) =
?b

#⊗ enriched_id E₂ y₂
· (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₂ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₂)) = ?t2

· identity (P y₁ x)

· (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) I_{ V}
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) I_{ V}
         · mon_lunitor (Q z y₂))) =

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) I_{ V} (Q z y₂)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (Q z y₂)
· mon_rassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) I_{ V}
· (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) I_{ V}
   · (identity (P y₁ x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) I_{ V}
      · identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ mon_lunitor (Q z y₂))) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

   #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) I_{ V} (Q z y₂)
      · (identity (P y₁ x)
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (Q z y₂)
         · (mon_rassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) I_{ V}
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)

· identity (P y₁ x)

· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) I_{ V} (Q z y₂)
      · (identity (P y₁ x)
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (Q z y₂)
         · (identity (P y₁ x)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) I_{ V}
            · identity (P y₁ x)
              #⊗ mon_lunitor (Q z y₂))))) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) I_{ V} (Q z y₂)
      · (identity (P y₁ x)
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (Q z y₂)
         · (identity (P y₁ x)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) I_{ V}
            · identity (P y₁ x)
              #⊗ mon_lunitor (Q z y₂))))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
?b = mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) I_{ V} (Q z y₂)
      · (identity (P y₁ x)
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (Q z y₂)
         · (identity (P y₁ x)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) I_{ V}
            · identity (P y₁ x)
              #⊗ mon_lunitor (Q z y₂))))) = ?b

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₁ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (Q z y₂)
· (identity (P y₁ x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) I_{ V}
   · identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ mon_lunitor (Q z y₂)) = 
?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₁ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (Q z y₂)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) I_{ V}
· identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ mon_lunitor (Q z y₂) = ?t2

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₁ x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (Q z y₂)
    · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) I_{ V})
· identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ mon_lunitor (Q z y₂) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (I_{ V} ⊗ Q z y₂)
· identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ mon_lunitor (Q z y₂) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₁ x ⊗ (I_{ V} ⊗ Q z y₂))
· identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ mon_lunitor (Q z y₂) = ?t2

          apply id_left.
        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) I_{ V} (Q z y₂)
      · identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ mon_lunitor (Q z y₂))) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
   · mon_runitor (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
   · mon_runitor (P y₁ x)) #⊗ identity (Q z y₂) =

· mon_lunitor (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₂) =

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
   · mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
· mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (I_{ V} ⊗ (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂))
· mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂) =
mon_lunitor (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)

        apply id_left.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ x₁ x₂ x₃ y : C₂,
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ x ⊗ Q z y)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ x) (Q z y)
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x ⊗ Q z y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ x) (Q z y)
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (P x₂ x) (Q z y)
   · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y))
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
        (Q z y₄)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
?b =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
        (Q z y₄)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))

(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)) = ?b

(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁)
#⊗ (identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)) = ?b

(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁)
#⊗ (identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄) = ?b

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_rassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄) = ?b

          
V: benabou_cosmos

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_rassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· (((sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) · enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁)
    #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)) = ?b

mon_rassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄) = ?b

          
V: benabou_cosmos

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_rassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄) = ?b

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_rassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)
     #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)) = ?b

          apply idpath.
        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_rassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)
     #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
        (Q z y₄)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
        (Q z y₄)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)) =
mon_rassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)
     #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
        (Q z y₄)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
?b =
mon_rassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)
     #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))

  ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
· lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄) = ?t2

          apply idpath.

mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
        (Q z y₄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)

  (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)
     #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))

  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)

· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)

· lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)

  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   ⊗ (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
          (Q z y₄)
   · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
       ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)) =

  (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)

y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂

  (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄))
    (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)

       ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)) =

  (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)

· (mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄))

        (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)

              (Q z y₄)

· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)

  (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
           (Q z y₄)
      · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)

  (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)

mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)

  (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)

  (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)

· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)

  (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)

· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₄) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
?b =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)

        
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₄) = ?b

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
           (Q z y₄)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
              (Q z y₄)
         · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
             ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)))) =
?b

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
        (Q z y₄)
   · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
       ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₄) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
    · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
        (Q z y₄))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₄) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₄) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₄))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₄) = ?t2

          apply id_left.
        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
   · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
       ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)
· identity
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x)
     ⊗ Q z y₄) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)

        apply id_right.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ x0 y₁ y₂ y₃ : C₂,
enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃
#⊗ identity (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
     (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P x0 x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
   · identity (P x0 x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₃)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y₁)
      · mon_lassociator (P x0 x) (Q z y₁)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · identity (P x0 x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
     (P x0 x ⊗ Q z y₂)
   · mon_lassociator (P x0 x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
   · identity (P x0 x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃))
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
enriched_comp E₂ y₂ y₃ y₄
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₄)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
      · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      · identity (P y₁ x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
enriched_comp E₂ y₂ y₃ y₄
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₄)) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
?b =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
      · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      · identity (P y₁ x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
enriched_comp E₂ y₂ y₃ y₄
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₄)) = ?b

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
enriched_comp E₂ y₂ y₃ y₄
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄) (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₄) = ?b

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y₂ y₃ y₄
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₄) = ?b

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· (identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
   #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y₂ y₃ y₄
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
      · identity (P y₁ x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₄))) =
?b

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
#⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y₂ y₃ y₄
· (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₄)) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
#⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y₂ y₃ y₄
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₄) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
(identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₂))
#⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y₂ y₃ y₄
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₄) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (identity (Q z y₂) #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y₂ y₃ y₄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₄) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
· (identity (P y₁ x)
   #⊗ (identity (Q z y₂) #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y₂ y₃ y₄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₄)) = ?t2

z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (P y₁ x)
#⊗ (identity (Q z y₂) #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y₂ y₃ y₄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₄) = ?t2

#⊗ (identity (Q z y₂) #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y₂ y₃ y₄
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
       · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₄)) = ?t2

#⊗ (identity (Q z y₂) #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y₂ y₃ y₄
    · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₄ ⦄)
    · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₄) = ?t2

#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
      ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
    · enriched_comp E₂ y₂ y₃ y₄ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
    · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₄) = ?t2

x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (P y₁ x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
      ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
    · (enriched_comp E₂ y₂ y₃ y₄ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
       · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₄)) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (P y₁ x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
      ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
    · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
         (Q z y₂)
       · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃
       · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (P y₁ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
· (identity (P y₁ x)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
        (Q z y₂)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃)
   · identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y₁ x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
           ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
      · (identity (P y₁ x)
         #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (Q z y₂)
         · identity (P y₁ x)
           #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
               #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃)
         · identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄))) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
      · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      · identity (P y₁ x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
      · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      · identity (P y₁ x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)) =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y₁ x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
           ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
      · (identity (P y₁ x)
         #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (Q z y₂)
         · identity (P y₁ x)
           #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
               #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃)
         · identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
      · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      · identity (P y₁ x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y₁ x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
           ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
      · (identity (P y₁ x)
         #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (Q z y₂)
         · identity (P y₁ x)
           #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
               #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃)
         · identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
      · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      · identity (P y₁ x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)) = ?b

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
         (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
       · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
            (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
          · identity (P y₁ x)
            #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
                  (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃)))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
      · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         · identity (P y₁ x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))) =
?b

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
    · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
         (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
       · identity (P y₁ x)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
               (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃)))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · identity (P y₁ x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄))) =
?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
    · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
    · identity (P y₁ x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
          · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃))
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂))
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
    · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
   · (identity (P y₁ x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
          · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃))
     #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂))
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
    · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₁ x)
       #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
           · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃))
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         · identity (P y₁ x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))) =
?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
(identity (P y₁ x)
 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
     · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃)) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)) = ?t2

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
(identity (P y₁ x)
 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
     · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃)) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄) = ?t2

  (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
       · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))

  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄) = ?t2

  (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· (identity (P y₁ x)

        · rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃)
       #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))

    #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)

       · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
          · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄))) = ?b

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂

#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
    · (rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
       · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
          · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄))) = ?b

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
   · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄) = ?t20

x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄ = ?t20

            
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₂)
  (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃
· rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄ = ?t20

            apply idpath.
          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (P y₁ x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₂)
         (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
       · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃
       · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (P y₁ x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))
· (identity (P y₁ x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₂)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃)
   · identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂))
   · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
         (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
       · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x)
           (Q z y₂ ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         · (identity (P y₁ x)
            #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
                  (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
                #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))
            · (identity (P y₁ x)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₂)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
               · identity (P y₁ x)
                 #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
                     #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃)
               · identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y₁ x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
           ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
      · (identity (P y₁ x)
         #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (Q z y₂)
         · identity (P y₁ x)
           #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
               #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃)
         · identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x)
           (Q z y₂ ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         · (identity (P y₁ x)
            #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
                  (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
                #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))
            · (identity (P y₁ x)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₂)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
               · identity (P y₁ x)
                 #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
                     #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃)
               · identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y₁ x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
           ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
      · (identity (P y₁ x)
         #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (Q z y₂)
         · identity (P y₁ x)
           #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
               #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃)
         · identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂ ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₂)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃)
· identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄ =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
       ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
       (Q z y₂)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₂ y₃)
· identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂ ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₂)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂)
       ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
       (Q z y₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
∏ o : V,
mon_lassociator o (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V o
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
  #⊗ identity o
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity o
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂ ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
    o
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity o)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₂) o =
sym_mon_braiding V (o ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂)
    (o ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (o ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator o (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (Q z y₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
∏ o o0 : V,
mon_lassociator o0 o (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V o0 (o ⊗ (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂))
· sym_mon_braiding V o (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
  #⊗ identity o0
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) o #⊗ identity o0
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂ ⊗ o) o0
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) o #⊗ identity o0)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (o ⊗ Q z y₂) o0 =
sym_mon_braiding V (o0 ⊗ o) (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₂)
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₂) (o0 ⊗ o)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (o0 ⊗ o)
· identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ mon_lassociator o0 o (Q z y₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
∏ o o0 o1 : V,
mon_lassociator o1 o0 (o ⊗ Q z y₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V o1 (o0 ⊗ (o ⊗ Q z y₂))
· sym_mon_braiding V o0 (o ⊗ Q z y₂) #⊗ identity o1
· mon_lassociator o (Q z y₂) o0 #⊗ identity o1
· mon_lassociator o (Q z y₂ ⊗ o0) o1
· identity o
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) o0 #⊗ identity o1)
· identity o #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (o0 ⊗ Q z y₂) o1 =
sym_mon_braiding V (o1 ⊗ o0) (o ⊗ Q z y₂)
· mon_lassociator o (Q z y₂) (o1 ⊗ o0)
· identity o #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₂) (o1 ⊗ o0)
· identity o #⊗ mon_lassociator o1 o0 (Q z y₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
∏ o o0 o1 o2 : V,
mon_lassociator o2 o1 (o0 ⊗ o)
· sym_mon_braiding V o2 (o1 ⊗ (o0 ⊗ o))
· sym_mon_braiding V o1 (o0 ⊗ o) #⊗ identity o2
· mon_lassociator o0 o o1 #⊗ identity o2
· mon_lassociator o0 (o ⊗ o1) o2
· identity o0
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V o o1 #⊗ identity o2)
· identity o0 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (o1 ⊗ o) o2 =
sym_mon_braiding V (o2 ⊗ o1) (o0 ⊗ o)
· mon_lassociator o0 o (o2 ⊗ o1)
· identity o0 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V o (o2 ⊗ o1)
· identity o0 #⊗ mon_lassociator o2 o1 o

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
· identity v₂
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄)
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₃ ⊗ v₁) v₄ =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
· identity v₂ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₁

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
      · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
            · (identity v₂
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
                   #⊗ identity v₄)
               · identity v₂
                 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₃ ⊗ v₁) v₄))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
      · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₁))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
      · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
            · (identity v₂
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
                   #⊗ identity v₄)
               · identity v₂
                 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₃ ⊗ v₁) v₄))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
      · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₁))

        
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
      · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
            · (identity v₂
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
                   #⊗ identity v₄)
               · identity v₂
                 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₃ ⊗ v₁) v₄))))) =
?b

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity v₂
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄)
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₃ ⊗ v₁) v₄ = 
?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity v₂
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
    · sym_mon_braiding V (v₃ ⊗ v₁) v₄) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity v₂
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
    · identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
· identity v₂
  #⊗ (identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
      · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
            · (identity v₂
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
               · identity v₂
                 #⊗ (identity v₄
                     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃)))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
      · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₁))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
      · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₁)) =
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
      · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
            · (identity v₂
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
               · identity v₂
                 #⊗ (identity v₄
                     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃))))))

· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
      · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₁)) = 
?b

· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))

· identity v₂ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₁ = ?t2

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity v₂
#⊗ (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
    · sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
    · mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃
    · identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
    · mon_rassociator v₄ v₃ v₁
    · mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₁) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity v₂
#⊗ (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
    · (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
       · (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃
          · (identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
             · (mon_rassociator v₄ v₃ v₁
                · mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₁))))) = 
?t2

    · (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
       · (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃
          · (identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
             · identity (v₄ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)))))) = ?t2

    · (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
       · (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃
          · identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃))) =

v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V

    · sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
    · mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity v₂
#⊗ (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
    · sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
    · mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃)
· identity v₂
  #⊗ (identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
   · (identity v₂
      #⊗ (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
          · sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
          · mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃)
      · identity v₂
        #⊗ (identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃))) =
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
      · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
            · (identity v₂
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
               · identity v₂
                 #⊗ (identity v₄
                     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃))))))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
· identity v₂
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
      · sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
      · mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃)
· identity v₂
  #⊗ (identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃) =
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
· identity v₂
  #⊗ (identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃)

        
V: benabou_cosmos

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
· identity v₂
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
      · sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
      · mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃) =
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
· identity v₂
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
      · sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
      · mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃)
