x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
· identity v₂
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
      · sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
      · mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃)

· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))

· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?y'

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
      · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
         · mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄))) = ?y'

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ v₂ ⊗ v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄,
         v₂ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)) ⟧,
   z · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄)
  mon_lassociator_lassociator: (λ z : V ⟦ v₂ ⊗ v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄,
       v₂ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)) ⟧,
 z · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄)
  (mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
   · mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)) =
(λ z : V ⟦ v₂ ⊗ v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄,
       v₂ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)) ⟧,
 z · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄)
  (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
   · mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
   · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₄)
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ v₂ ⊗ v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄,
         v₂ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)) ⟧,
   z · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄)
  mon_lassociator_lassociator: mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄ =
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
· identity v₂ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
· identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p: mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
   · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄) =
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· (mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
      · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄))
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p: mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
   · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄) =
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· (mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
   · identity v₂
     #⊗ (mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
         · mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄))
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p: mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
   · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄) =
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· (mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
   · identity v₂ #⊗ identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄))
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p: mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
   · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄) =
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· (mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
   · identity (v₂ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₄)))
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p: mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
   · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄) =
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?t2

          exact (!p).
        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
      · (mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
            · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄))))
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
· identity v₂
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
      · sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
      · mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
      · (mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
            · (identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
               · identity v₂
                 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
   · identity v₂
     #⊗ (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
         · (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
            · mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃)))

   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄

v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄

                  · sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄))))) =

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category

y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
   · identity v₂
     #⊗ (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
         · (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
            · mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃)))

   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄

· sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₄ = ?t2

· (mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
   · identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄
   · mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
   · sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
   · mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃) = ?t2

v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₄ · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₄
· identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
· sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ = ?t2

x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₄))
· identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
· sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ = ?t2

v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
· sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
      · (mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
            · identity v₂
              #⊗ (identity v₁
                  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄
                  · mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
                  · sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄
                    #⊗ identity v₃
                  · mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
   · identity v₂
     #⊗ (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
         · (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃
            · mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃)))

z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
      · (mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
            · (identity v₂
               #⊗ (identity v₁
                   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄)
               · identity v₂
                 #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
               · identity v₂
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄
                     #⊗ identity v₃)
               · identity v₂
                 #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
      · (identity v₂
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃)
         · identity v₂ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃)))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· identity v₂
  #⊗ (identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄)
· identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
· identity v₂
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃)
· identity v₂ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)
· identity v₂ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃
· identity v₂
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃)
· identity v₂ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃

· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)
· identity v₂
  #⊗ (identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄) =

· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)

v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V

· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
      · (mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₄)

z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
      · (mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
         · ((identity v₂ #⊗ identity v₁)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄
            · mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
· (identity v₂ #⊗ identity v₁)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃)

        
V: benabou_cosmos

x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
· (identity v₂ #⊗ identity v₁)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄ =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₄
· identity (v₂ ⊗ v₁) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄ =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) (v₂ ⊗ v₁)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
∏ o : V,
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ o
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ o)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ o #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator o v₃ v₄
· identity o #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄ =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) o

        
V: benabou_cosmos

v₃, v₄: V
∏ o : V,
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ o
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ o)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ o #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator o v₃ v₄
· identity o #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄ =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) o

· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₂ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₄
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄ =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₃, v₄, v₂: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₂ #⊗ identity v₄
      · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₄
         · identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₃, v₄, v₂: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₂ #⊗ identity v₄
      · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₄
         · identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄))) =
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₂
· mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₃
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₄ v₃

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₃, v₄, v₂: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₂ #⊗ identity v₄
      · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₄
         · identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄))) =
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· (identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₂
   · (mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₃
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
         · mon_lassociator v₂ v₄ v₃)))

        
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₃, v₄, v₂: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₂ #⊗ identity v₄
   · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₄
      · identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄)) =
identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₂
· (mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₃
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
      · mon_lassociator v₂ v₄ v₃))

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₃, v₄, v₂: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₂ #⊗ identity v₄
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₄
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄ =
identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₂
· mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₃
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₄ v₃

z: C₃
x: C₁

v₃, v₄, v₂: V
identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₃)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₄
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄ =

· mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₃
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₄ v₃

v₃, v₄, v₂: V
identity (v₄ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₃))
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₃)
   · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₄
      · identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄)) =

· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
   · mon_lassociator v₂ v₄ v₃)

   · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₄

x: C₁

v₃, v₄, v₂: V

· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₄ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃
      · identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄)) =

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₃, v₄, v₂: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₄ v₃
   · identity v₂
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃
         · sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄)) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₄ v₃

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₃, v₄, v₂: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₄ v₃
   · identity v₂ #⊗ identity (v₄ ⊗ v₃)) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₄ v₃

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₃, v₄, v₂: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₄ v₃
   · identity (v₂ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ v₃))) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₄ v₃

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₃, v₄, v₂: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₄ v₃ =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₄ v₃

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ x)
        (Q z y₁)
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P x₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P x₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P x₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P x₁ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
      · mon_lassociator (P x₁ x) (Q z y₁)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · identity (P x₁ x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ x) (Q z y₂)
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₂))
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
        (Q z y₃)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₃))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
      · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · identity (P y₁ x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      #⊗ (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
            (Q z y₃)
          · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₃))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
           (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₃)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
            · identity (P y₂ x)
              #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄))))) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
       · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
            (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
          · identity (P y₁ x)
            #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
                  (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
        (Q z y₄)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      #⊗ (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
            (Q z y₃)
          · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₃))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
           (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₃)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
            · identity (P y₂ x)
              #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
?b =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
       · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
            (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
          · identity (P y₁ x)
            #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
                  (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
        (Q z y₄)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)))

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      #⊗ (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
            (Q z y₃)
          · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₃))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
           (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₃)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
            · identity (P y₂ x)
              #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄))))) =
?b

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
    · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₃))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₃)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · identity (P y₂ x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄))) =
?t2

identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  #⊗ (lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₃))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₃)

        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)

identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ (lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₃))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₃)

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ (lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₃))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₃))
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄) = ?t2

x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· ((lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₃))
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₃)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)

        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)

(lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₃))
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)) = ?t2

x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
(lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₃))
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄) = ?t2

z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
  (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
  #⊗ (identity (Q z y₃) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄) = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

x: C₁

  (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· (lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
   #⊗ (identity (Q z y₃) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)

x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
#⊗ (identity (Q z y₃) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄) = ?t2

x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
#⊗ identity (Q z y₃ ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄) = ?t2

y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
    · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄ = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
           (Q z y₃)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
           ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
         · (mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x)
              (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
            · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
               · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄))))) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
       · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
            (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
          · identity (P y₁ x)
            #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
                  (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
        (Q z y₄)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
       · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
            (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
          · identity (P y₁ x)
            #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
                  (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
        (Q z y₄)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
           (Q z y₃)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
           ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
         · (mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x)
              (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
            · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
               · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
       · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
            (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
          · identity (P y₁ x)
            #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
                  (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
        (Q z y₄)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))) = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
           (Q z y₃)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
           ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
         · (mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x)
              (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
            · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
               · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))))

        
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
         (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
       · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
            (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
          · identity (P y₁ x)
            #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
                  (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
        (Q z y₄)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄))) = 
?b

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
    · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
         (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
       · identity (P y₁ x)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
               (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
    · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
    · identity (P y₁ x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
          · rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄) = ?t2

identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (P y₁ x)
       #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))

#⊗ (identity (P y₁ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)) = ?t2

· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₄)

  ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
  #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄) = ?t2

  ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₃)
· ((identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
   #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)) = ?t2

  ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x)
   #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₄)) = ?t2

  ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₃)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄ = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (P y₁ x)
             #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
                  (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))
         · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
              ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₃)
            · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
      #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
           (Q z y₃)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
           ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
         · (mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x)
              (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
            · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
               · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄)))))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
       (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (P y₁ x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₃)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
    (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₃ y₄

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
       (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (P y₁ x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₃) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
    (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
∏ o : V,
mon_lassociator o (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity o
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
       (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity o
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity o
  #⊗ (identity (P y₁ x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator o (P y₁ x)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₃) =
sym_mon_braiding V o (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄) o (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator o (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
    (o ⊗ P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· mon_lassociator (o ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
    (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)
· identity (o ⊗ P y₁ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₄ ⦄)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
∏ o o0 : V,
mon_lassociator o0 o (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity o0
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V o (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity o0 #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) o
· identity o0
  #⊗ (identity (P y₁ x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) o)
· mon_rassociator o0 (P y₁ x) (o ⊗ Q z y₃) =
sym_mon_braiding V o0 o #⊗ identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· mon_lassociator o o0 (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity o #⊗ mon_rassociator o0 (P y₁ x) (Q z y₃)
· sym_mon_braiding V o (o0 ⊗ P y₁ x ⊗ Q z y₃)
· mon_lassociator (o0 ⊗ P y₁ x) (Q z y₃) o
· identity (o0 ⊗ P y₁ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) o

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
∏ o o0 o1 : V,
mon_lassociator o1 o0 (o ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity o1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V o0 (o ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity o1 #⊗ mon_lassociator o (Q z y₃) o0
· identity o1
  #⊗ (identity o #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) o0)
· mon_rassociator o1 o (o0 ⊗ Q z y₃) =
sym_mon_braiding V o1 o0 #⊗ identity (o ⊗ Q z y₃)
· mon_lassociator o0 o1 (o ⊗ Q z y₃)
· identity o0 #⊗ mon_rassociator o1 o (Q z y₃)
· sym_mon_braiding V o0 (o1 ⊗ o ⊗ Q z y₃)
· mon_lassociator (o1 ⊗ o) (Q z y₃) o0
· identity (o1 ⊗ o) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₃) o0

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
∏ o o0 o1 o2 : V,
mon_lassociator o2 o1 (o0 ⊗ o)
· identity o2 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V o1 (o0 ⊗ o)
· identity o2 #⊗ mon_lassociator o0 o o1
· identity o2
  #⊗ (identity o0 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V o o1)
· mon_rassociator o2 o0 (o1 ⊗ o) =
sym_mon_braiding V o2 o1 #⊗ identity (o0 ⊗ o)
· mon_lassociator o1 o2 (o0 ⊗ o)
· identity o1 #⊗ mon_rassociator o2 o0 o
· sym_mon_braiding V o1 (o2 ⊗ o0 ⊗ o)
· mon_lassociator (o2 ⊗ o0) o o1
· identity (o2 ⊗ o0) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V o o1

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· identity v₄
  #⊗ (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃)
· mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ v₃
· identity (v₄ ⊗ v₂) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · (identity v₄ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
      · (identity v₄
         #⊗ (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃)
         · mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · (identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ v₃
            · identity (v₄ ⊗ v₂)
              #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃))))

        
V: benabou_cosmos

y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · (identity v₄ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
      · (mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃)
         · (identity v₄ #⊗ identity v₂)
           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃))) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · (identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ v₃
            · identity (v₄ ⊗ v₂)
              #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃))))

   · (identity v₄ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
      · (identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
         · mon_rassociator v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃

· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₄ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
      · mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁ #⊗ identity v₃))

· identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· mon_rassociator v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₄ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))

v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· mon_rassociator v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ = ?b

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ v₃ = ?y'

          
V: benabou_cosmos

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · (identity v₄ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
      · identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₂ v₁ v₃)) =
?y'

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category

z: C₃
x: C₁

v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_rassociator v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₄ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))

· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₄ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
· mon_lassociator v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) v₃ = ?t2

          apply sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator.
        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄ #⊗ identity (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)) =
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)

x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄ #⊗ identity (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) =

· identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ · sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₄)
#⊗ identity (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) =
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)

z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity (v₄ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ identity (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) =
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)

        
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity (v₄ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁))
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) =
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: C₂
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁) =
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
enriched_profunctor_laws ?P

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_profunctor_data E₂ E₂
 exact comp_enriched_profunctor_coend_data.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_profunctor_laws
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend_data
 exact comp_enriched_profunctor_coend_laws.
    Defined.

    (** * 2. The coend used to define composition *)
    Definition comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
      : V
      := enriched_profunctor_coend comp_enriched_profunctor_coend.

    Definition comp_enriched_profunctor_in
              (y : C₂)
      : P y x ⊗ Q z y --> comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
      := enriched_profunctor_coend_in
           comp_enriched_profunctor_coend
           y.

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁ =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁ =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
   · (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (P y₂ x)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
               (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (identity (P y₂ x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂

      exact (enriched_profunctor_coend_comm
               comp_enriched_profunctor_coend
               y₁ y₂).
    Qed.

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ =
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ =
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ =
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
           (Q z y₁)
         · (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ =
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
           (Q z y₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
              (Q z y₁)
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
            · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
                (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · identity (P y₂ x)
              #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂))))

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
           (Q z y₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
              (Q z y₁)
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
            · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
                (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · identity (P y₂ x)
              #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂)))) =
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
           (Q z y₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
              (Q z y₁)
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
            · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
                (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · identity (P y₂ x)
              #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂)))) = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
?b =
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
           (Q z y₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
              (Q z y₁)
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
            · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
                (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · identity (P y₂ x)
              #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂)))) = 
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
         · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
             (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · identity (P y₂ x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂))) =
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
         · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
             (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · identity (P y₂ x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
?b =
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
         · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
             (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · identity (P y₂ x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁ ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ = ?t2

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ = ?t2

        apply idpath.

identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)

      · identity (P y₂ x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂)) =

· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x ⊗ (Q z y₁ ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)))
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ = ?t2

identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· (identity (P y₂ x)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂) =
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ =
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ =
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
    · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ =
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₁)
    · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ =
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ =
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e_arr Q g z
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ =
lmap_e_arr P x g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e_arr Q g z
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ =
lmap_e_arr P x g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: lmap_e_arr comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ g
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
rmap_e_arr comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g y₂
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e_arr Q g z
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ =
lmap_e_arr P x g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂ y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂ y₁)
· lmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂ y₁ y₁
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂ y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂ y₁)
· rmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂ y₁ y₂
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e_arr Q g z
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ =
lmap_e_arr P x g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e_arr Q g z
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ =
lmap_e_arr P x g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e_arr Q g z
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
lmap_e_arr P x g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁

  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)

       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)

· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e_arr Q g z
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂

  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)

#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q z y₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)

x: C₁

p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)

· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
?b =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂

p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)

   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))

· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q z y₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
    · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂ = ?b

· identity (P y₂ x)

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁

p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z y₁)
· (identity (P y₂ x)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
   · (identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂)) = ?b

          apply idpath.

· (identity (P y₂ x)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))

   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
