     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂ =
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z y₁)
· (identity (P y₂ x)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
   · (identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂ = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
?b =
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z y₁)
· (identity (P y₂ x)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
   · (identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂))

p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂ = ?b

  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)

p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)

   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in

· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂

· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂ = ?t2

z: C₃

p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)

     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (P y₂ x)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
               (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
         · enriched_profunctor_coend_in
             comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂))) =
?t2

· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
(identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂ = ?t2

g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)

   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) I_{ V}
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (identity (Q z y₁) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂ = ?t2

p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =

· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) I_{ V}
· (identity (P y₂ x)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
   · identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂ = ?t2

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) I_{ V}
      · (identity (P y₂ x)
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) I_{ V}
         · (identity (P y₂ x)
            #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g
                #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
            · identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
         · enriched_profunctor_coend_in
             comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂))) =
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z y₁)
· (identity (P y₂ x)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
   · (identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂))

g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) I_{ V}
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) I_{ V}
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂ =
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₂

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) I_{ V}
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) I_{ V} =
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z y₁)

· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)

z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)

· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂

· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) I_{ V}
         · identity (P y₂ x)
           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) I_{ V}))) =
identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z y₁)

· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) I_{ V} (Q z y₁)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (Q z y₁)
         · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) I_{ V})) = 
?t2

  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)

  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)

     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) I_{ V} (Q z y₁)
   · identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ identity (I_{ V} ⊗ Q z y₁)) =
?t2

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
lmap_e_arr P x g #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁

· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))

 · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x)
 · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁

   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
?b =
(mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
 · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x)
 · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁

       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)

· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x))
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)

· enriched_profunctor_coend_in

mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
   · ((enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x))

 · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x)

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x))
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x))
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in y₁

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)

p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)

   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))

· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂

· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁) =

V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
   · mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)) =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p:= enriched_profunctor_coend_comm_arr
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend g: mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
     (Q z y₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₁ =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))
· enriched_profunctor_coend_in
    comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y₂
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· identity (I_{ V} ⊗ P y₂ x ⊗ Q z y₁) =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)

        apply id_right.
    Qed.

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
v: V
fs: ∏ y : C₂, V ⟦ P y x ⊗ Q z y, v ⟧
ps: ∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁) · fs y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (Q z y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ · fs y₂
V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob, v ⟧

    
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
v: V
fs: ∏ y : C₂, V ⟦ P y x ⊗ Q z y, v ⟧
ps: ∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁) · fs y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (Q z y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ · fs y₂
V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob, v ⟧

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
v: V
fs: ∏ y : C₂, V ⟦ P y x ⊗ Q z y, v ⟧
ps: ∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁) · fs y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (Q z y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ · fs y₂
∏ x : C₂, V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor_coend x x, v ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
v: V
fs: ∏ y : C₂, V ⟦ P y x ⊗ Q z y, v ⟧
ps: ∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁) · fs y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (Q z y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ · fs y₂
∏ x0 y : C₂,
lmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y x0 x0 · ?fs x0 =
rmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y x0 y · ?fs y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
v: V
fs: ∏ y : C₂, V ⟦ P y x ⊗ Q z y, v ⟧
ps: ∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁) · fs y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (Q z y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ · fs y₂
∏ x : C₂, V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor_coend x x, v ⟧
 exact fs.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
v: V
fs: ∏ y : C₂, V ⟦ P y x ⊗ Q z y, v ⟧
ps: ∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁) · fs y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (Q z y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ · fs y₂
∏ x y : C₂,
lmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y x x · fs x =
rmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_coend y x y · fs y
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           intros y₁ y₂ ;
           rewrite sym_mon_tensor_lassociator ;
           rewrite !assoc' ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ · (_ · (_ · z))) (assoc _ _ _)) ;
           rewrite mon_rassociator_lassociator ;
           rewrite id_left ;
           rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ · (_ · z)) (assoc _ _ _)) ;
           rewrite <- tensor_comp_id_l ;
           rewrite !assoc ;
           rewrite sym_mon_braiding_inv ;
           rewrite id_left ;
           apply ps).
    Defined.

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
v: V
fs: ∏ y : C₂, V ⟦ P y x ⊗ Q z y, v ⟧
ps: ∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁) · fs y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (Q z y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ · fs y₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in y
· from_comp_enriched_profunctor_ob fs ps = fs y

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
v: V
fs: ∏ y : C₂, V ⟦ P y x ⊗ Q z y, v ⟧
ps: ∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z y₁) · fs y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (Q z y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ · fs y₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in y
· from_comp_enriched_profunctor_ob fs ps = fs y

      apply (from_enriched_profunctor_coend_comm
               comp_enriched_profunctor_coend).
    Qed.

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
v: V
f, g: V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob, v ⟧
ps: ∏ y : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in y · f =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in y · g
f = g

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
v: V
f, g: V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob, v ⟧
ps: ∏ y : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in y · f =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in y · g
f = g

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
v: V
f, g: V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob, v ⟧
ps: ∏ y : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in y · f =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in y · g
∏ x : C₂,
enriched_profunctor_coend_in
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend x · f =
enriched_profunctor_coend_in
  comp_enriched_profunctor_coend x · g

      exact ps.
    Qed.
  End CoendProfunctor.

  (** * 3. The left action *)
  Section LeftAction.
    Context (z₁ z₂ : C₃)
            (x : C₁).

    Definition comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor
               (y : C₂)
      : E₃ ⦃ z₂ , z₁ ⦄ ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        -->
        comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x
      := sym_mon_braiding _ _ _
         · mon_lassociator _ _ _
         · (identity _ #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding _ _ _ · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y))
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y.

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)
· internal_transpose
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor y₁) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂
· internal_transpose
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor y₂)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)
· internal_transpose
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor y₁) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂
· internal_transpose
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor y₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
        · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
            (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · identity (P y₁ x)
          #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁)
                (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
        · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
        · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
            (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · identity (P y₂ x)
          #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)
        · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧),
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
         · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
             (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · identity (P y₁ x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)
 · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
 · identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
         · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
             (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · identity (P y₂ x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
         · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
             (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · identity (P y₁ x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)
 · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
 · identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
         · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
             (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · identity (P y₂ x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
        · mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
            (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · identity (P y₁ x)
          #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁)
                (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
        · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁))
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
        · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
            (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · identity (P y₂ x)
          #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)
        · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂))
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · (identity (P y₁ x)
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁))))
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (internal_lam
           (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
               · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
                    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  · (identity (P y₂ x)
                     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                         · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)
                     · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂
                         x y₂))))
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (identity (P y₁ x)
            #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁)))) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)
                  · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x
                      y₂))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (identity (P y₁ x)
            #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁)))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)
                  · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x
                      y₂))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (identity (P y₁ x)
            #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁)))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (identity (P y₁ x)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁)
               (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁))) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P y₁ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁ ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)
                  · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x
                      y₂))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

x: C₁

(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁) = ?b

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)
                  · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x
                      y₂))))))

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category

x: C₁

a: V

(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h = ?y'

        apply tensor_split.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) #⊗ h
· (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₁ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)
                  · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x
                      y₂))))))

· (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₁ x) (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁) = ?b

 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)
                  · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x
                      y₂))))))

#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧

  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x
  #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y₁) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y₁ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁ = ?t2

   #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y₁) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
   #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁
   · (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y₁)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
#⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁
· (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y₁)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₁) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
#⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z₂ y₁)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₂ y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₂ y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂) = ?t2

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
#⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z₂ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₂ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂ = ?t2

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x))
#⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x) (Q z₂ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₂ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₂ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂ = ?t2

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₂ y₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₂ y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · (identity (P y₂ x)
            #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁)
                  (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂)))) =
?t2

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₂ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₂ y₁)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (P y₂ x)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁)
               (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂))) =
?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₂ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
· (identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
· ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₂ y₁)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (P y₂ x)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁)
               (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂))) =
?t2

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (identity (P y₂ x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
  (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂ = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
  (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y₂ x)
   #⊗ (lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y₂ x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂)) = ?t2

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ (lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
· (identity (P y₂ x)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂) = ?t2

#⊗ (lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂ = ?t2

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ (lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂ = ?t2

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ (lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
      (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁
    · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂ = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
