x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
      (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₁
       · rmap_e Q z₂ y₁ y₂))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
      (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         (Q z₁ y₁)
       · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)
       · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
       · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂
       · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
     (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y₂ x)
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (Q z₁ y₁)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
   · identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
     (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                       ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                  · (identity (P y₂ x)
                     #⊗ mon_rassociator
                          (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                     · identity (P y₂ x)
                       #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
                             (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                             (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                           #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
                     · identity (P y₂ x)
                       #⊗ mon_lassociator
                            (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                            (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                     · identity (P y₂ x)
                       #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                           #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
                     · identity (P y₂ x)
                       #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)
                  · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x
                      y₂)))))) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)
                  · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x
                      y₂))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂ =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂ =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
     (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                       ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                  · (identity (P y₂ x)
                     #⊗ mon_rassociator
                          (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                     · (identity (P y₂ x)
                        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
                              (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                            #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
                        · (identity (P y₂ x)
                           #⊗ mon_lassociator
                                (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                                (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                                (Q z₁ y₁)
                           · (identity (P y₂ x)
                              #⊗ (identity (...)
                                  #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
                              · identity (P y₂ x)
                                #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)))))))))) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · identity (P y₂ x)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · identity (P y₂ x)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)))))) =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
     (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                       ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                  · (identity (P y₂ x)
                     #⊗ mon_rassociator
                          (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                     · (identity (P y₂ x)
                        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
                              (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                            #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
                        · (identity (P y₂ x)
                           #⊗ mon_lassociator
                                (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                                (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                                (Q z₁ y₁)
                           · (identity (P y₂ x)
                              #⊗ (identity (...)
                                  #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
                              · identity (P y₂ x)
                                #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂))))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · identity (P y₂ x)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)))))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
     (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                       ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                  · (identity (P y₂ x)
                     #⊗ mon_rassociator
                          (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                     · (identity (P y₂ x)
                        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
                              (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                            #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
                        · (identity (P y₂ x)
                           #⊗ mon_lassociator
                                (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                                (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                                (Q z₁ y₁)
                           · (identity (P y₂ x)
                              #⊗ (identity (...)
                                  #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
                              · identity (P y₂ x)
                                #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂))))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · identity (P y₂ x)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)))))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ h = ?y'

        apply tensor_split.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
   #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · identity (P y₂ x)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)))))) =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
     (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                       ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                  · (identity (P y₂ x)
                     #⊗ mon_rassociator
                          (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                     · (identity (P y₂ x)
                        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
                              (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                            #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
                        · (identity (P y₂ x)
                           #⊗ mon_lassociator
                                (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                                (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                                (Q z₁ y₁)
                           · (identity (P y₂ x)
                              #⊗ (identity (...)
                                  #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
                              · identity (P y₂ x)
                                #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂))))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) #⊗ h
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (Q z₁ y₁) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
               · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
                    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  · identity (P y₂ x)
                    #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                        · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂))))))) =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
     (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                       ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                  · (identity (P y₂ x)
                     #⊗ mon_rassociator
                          (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                     · (identity (P y₂ x)
                        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
                              (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                            #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
                        · (identity (P y₂ x)
                           #⊗ mon_lassociator
                                (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                                (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                                (Q z₁ y₁)
                           · (identity (P y₂ x)
                              #⊗ (identity (...)
                                  #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
                              · identity (P y₂ x)
                                #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂))))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · identity (P y₂ x)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)))))) =
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
         · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x)
              ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · (identity (P y₂ x)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                  · (identity (P y₂ x)
                     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
                           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                         #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
                     · (identity (P y₂ x)
                        #⊗ mon_lassociator
                             (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                             (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                        · (identity (P y₂ x)
                           #⊗ (identity
                                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                               #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
                           · identity (P y₂ x)
                             #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · identity (P y₂ x)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)))))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
         · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x)
              ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · (identity (P y₂ x)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                  · (identity (P y₂ x)
                     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
                           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                         #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
                     · (identity (P y₂ x)
                        #⊗ mon_lassociator
                             (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                             (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                        · (identity (P y₂ x)
                           #⊗ (identity
                                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                               #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
                           · identity (P y₂ x)
                             #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · identity (P y₂ x)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)))))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · identity (P y₂ x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂))) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P y₂ x ⊗ Q z₁ y₂ ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · identity (P y₂ x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)))) =
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
         · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x)
              ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · (identity (P y₂ x)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                  · (identity (P y₂ x)
                     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
                           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                         #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
                     · (identity (P y₂ x)
                        #⊗ mon_lassociator
                             (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                             (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                        · (identity (P y₂ x)
                           #⊗ (identity
                                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                               #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
                           · identity (P y₂ x)
                             #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · identity (P y₂ x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
         · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x)
              ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · (identity (P y₂ x)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                  · (identity (P y₂ x)
                     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
                           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                         #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
                     · (identity (P y₂ x)
                        #⊗ mon_lassociator
                             (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                             (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                        · (identity (P y₂ x)
                           #⊗ (identity
                                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                               #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
                           · identity (P y₂ x)
                             #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · identity (P y₂ x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (P y₂ x)
   #⊗ (rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · identity (P y₂ x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ (rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂) = ?t2

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ (rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ (rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₂) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
      (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂
    · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (P y₂ x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x)
        ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (identity (P y₂ x)
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
              ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · identity (P y₂ x)
           #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
         · identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂))) =
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
         · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x)
              ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
              (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · (identity (P y₂ x)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y₂ x)
                  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                  · (identity (P y₂ x)
                     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
                           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                         #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
                     · (identity (P y₂ x)
                        #⊗ mon_lassociator
                             (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                             (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
                        · (identity (P y₂ x)
                           #⊗ (identity
                                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                               #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
                           · identity (P y₂ x)
                             #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂)))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂ =
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
mon_lassociator ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₁)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y₁)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
∏ o : V,
(sym_mon_braiding V o (P y₂ x) #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) o (Q z₁ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (o ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (o ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (o ⊗ P y₂ x) (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (o ⊗ P y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator o (P y₂ x)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V o
    (P y₂ x ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
    o
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) o
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator o (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V o (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) o (Q z₁ y₁)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
∏ o o0 : V,
(sym_mon_braiding V o0 o #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator o o0 (Q z₁ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator o (o0 ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity o
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (o0 ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (o0 ⊗ o) (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (o0 ⊗ o)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y₁) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator o0 o ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V o0
    (o ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁))
· mon_lassociator o ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) o0
· identity o
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y₁) o0
· identity o
  #⊗ mon_rassociator o0 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
· identity o
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V o0 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁))
· identity o
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) o0 (Q z₁ y₁)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
∏ o o0 o1 : V,
(sym_mon_braiding V o1 o0 #⊗ identity o)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator o0 o1 o #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator o0 (o1 ⊗ o) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity o0
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (o1 ⊗ o) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (o1 ⊗ o0) o (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (o1 ⊗ o0)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V o (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator o1 o0 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ o)
· sym_mon_braiding V o1 (o0 ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ o))
· mon_lassociator o0 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ o) o1
· identity o0
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ o) o1
· identity o0 #⊗ mon_rassociator o1 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) o
· identity o0
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V o1 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity o)
· identity o0 #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) o1 o

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
∏ o o0 o1 o2 : V,
(sym_mon_braiding V o2 o1 #⊗ identity o0)
#⊗ identity o · mon_lassociator o1 o2 o0 #⊗ identity o
· mon_lassociator o1 (o2 ⊗ o0) o
· identity o1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (o2 ⊗ o0) o =
mon_lassociator (o2 ⊗ o1) o0 o
· identity (o2 ⊗ o1) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V o0 o
· mon_lassociator o2 o1 (o ⊗ o0)
· sym_mon_braiding V o2 (o1 ⊗ (o ⊗ o0))
· mon_lassociator o1 (o ⊗ o0) o2
· identity o1 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (o ⊗ o0) o2
· identity o1 #⊗ mon_rassociator o2 o o0
· identity o1
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V o2 o #⊗ identity o0)
· identity o1 #⊗ mon_lassociator o o2 o0

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
#⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁
· identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ =
mon_lassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₁
· identity (v₄ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ v₂))
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
· identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
· identity v₃
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂)
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
#⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁
· identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
?b =
mon_lassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₁
· identity (v₄ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ v₂))
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
· identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
· identity v₃
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂)
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
#⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁
· identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ = 
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
#⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
#⊗ identity v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
   · mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁) = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ v₃ ⊗ v₄ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₁,
         v₃ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)) ⟧,
   z · identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁)
  mon_lassociator_lassociator: (λ z : V ⟦ v₃ ⊗ v₄ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₁,
       v₃ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)) ⟧,
 z · identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁)
  (mon_lassociator (v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂ v₁
   · mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)) =
(λ z : V ⟦ v₃ ⊗ v₄ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₁,
       v₃ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)) ⟧,
 z · identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁)
  (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
   · mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁
   · identity v₃ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₂ v₁)
mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ v₃ ⊗ v₄ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₁,
         v₃ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)) ⟧,
   z · identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁)
  mon_lassociator_lassociator: mon_lassociator (v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂ v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁ =
mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p: mon_lassociator (v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂ v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁) =
mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁
   · (identity v₃ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
      · identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁))
mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p: mon_lassociator (v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂ v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁) =
mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁
   · identity v₃
     #⊗ (mon_lassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
         · mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁))
mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p: mon_lassociator (v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂ v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁) =
mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁
   · identity v₃ #⊗ identity (v₄ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₁))
mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p: mon_lassociator (v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂ v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁) =
mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁
   · identity (v₃ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₁)))
mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p: mon_lassociator (v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂ v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁) =
mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁
mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ = ?t2

        exact (!p).
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
#⊗ identity v₁
· (mon_lassociator (v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂ v₁
   · (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
      · identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁))
· identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ =
mon_lassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₁
· identity (v₄ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ v₂))
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
· identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
· identity v₃
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂)
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
#⊗ identity v₁ · mon_lassociator (v₃ ⊗ v₄) v₂ v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ =
mon_lassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₁
· identity (v₄ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ v₂))
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
· identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
· identity v₃
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂)
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃
  #⊗ (identity v₂ #⊗ identity v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ =
mon_lassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₁
· identity (v₄ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ v₂))
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
· identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
· identity v₃
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂)
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₁
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃
   #⊗ (identity v₂ #⊗ identity v₁)
   · (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
      · (identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
         · identity v₃
           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁))) =
mon_lassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₁
· (identity (v₄ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
   · (mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ v₂))
         · (mon_lassociator v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
            · (identity v₃
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
               · (identity v₃
                  #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
                  · (identity v₃
                     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁
                         #⊗ identity v₂)
                     · identity v₃
                       #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂)))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃
#⊗ (identity v₂ #⊗ identity v₁)
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · (identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
      · identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁)) =
identity (v₄ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ v₂))
      · (mon_lassociator v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
         · (identity v₃
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
            · (identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
               · (identity v₃
                  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁
                      #⊗ identity v₂)
                  · identity v₃
                    #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity (v₄ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ v₂))
      · (mon_lassociator v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
         · (identity v₃
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
            · (identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
               · (identity v₃
                  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁
                      #⊗ identity v₂)
                  · identity v₃
                    #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂)))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃
#⊗ (identity v₂ #⊗ identity v₁)
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · (identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
      · identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity (v₄ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ v₂))
      · (mon_lassociator v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
         · (identity v₃
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
            · (identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
               · (identity v₃
                  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁
                      #⊗ identity v₂)
                  · identity v₃
                    #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂)))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃
#⊗ (identity v₂ #⊗ identity v₁)
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · (identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
      · identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁))

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity (v₄ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ v₂))
      · (mon_lassociator v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
         · (identity v₃
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
            · (identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
               · (identity v₃

                      #⊗ identity v₂)
                  · identity v₃
                    #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂)))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ v₂))
   · (mon_lassociator v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
      · (identity v₃
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
         · (identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
            · (identity v₃
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁
                   #⊗ identity v₂)
               · identity v₃
                 #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂))))) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ v₂))
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
· identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
· identity v₃
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂)
· identity v₃ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ v₂))
· mon_lassociator v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄ = ?y'

        apply sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity (v₄ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
   · mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
   · identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
   · identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
   · identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
   · identity v₃
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂)
   · identity v₃ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃
#⊗ (identity v₂ #⊗ identity v₁)
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · (identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
      · identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity (v₄ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
   · mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
   · identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
   · identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
   · identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
   · identity v₃
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂)
   · identity v₃ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃
#⊗ (identity v₂ #⊗ identity v₁)
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₂ ⊗ v₁)
   · (identity v₃ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
      · identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁))

   · (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)

   · (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity v₃
#⊗ (identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
    · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
       · (sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
          · (mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁
                #⊗ identity v₂
                · mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂))))) =
identity v₃
#⊗ (mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
    · sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
      · (mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
            · mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂)))) =
mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₄: V
identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
      · (mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
            · mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂)))) =
mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₄: V
identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
      · (mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
            · mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂)))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₄: V
?b =
mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₄: V
identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
      · (mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
            · mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂)))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
   · (mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
         · mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂))) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₁ ⊗ v₂) v₄
· mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₄: V
identity (v₄ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)) · mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₄: V
mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₄: V
identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· (mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
   · sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
   · mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂) =
mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
