E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₄: V
identity v₄ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁
· mon_rassociator v₄ v₁ v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂ =
mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₄: V
mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₂ · mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂ =
mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₄: V
mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· (sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁
   · (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₂
      · mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ v₂)) =
mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₄: V
mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· (sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁
   · identity (v₁ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ v₂))) =
mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₄: V
mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁ =
mon_rassociator v₄ v₂ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x,
(E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x ⟧

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x,
(E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x ⟧

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
V ⟦ P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y,
(E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁) · ?fs y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂ · ?fs y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
V ⟦ P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y,
(E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x ⟧
 exact (λ y, internal_transpose (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor y)).
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)
· (λ y : C₂,
   internal_transpose
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor y)) y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (Q z₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z₁ y₁ y₂
· (λ y : C₂,
   internal_transpose
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor y)) y₂
 exact comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_eq.
    Defined.

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor y

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
 · from_comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x
     (λ y : C₂,
      internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor y))
     comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_eq)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor y =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor y

      apply idpath.
    Qed.
  End LeftAction.

  (** * 4. The right action *)
  Section RightAction.
    Context (z : C₃)
            (x₁ x₂ : C₁).

    Definition comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor
               (y : C₂)
      : E₁ ⦃ x₁ , x₂ ⦄ ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
        -->
        comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂
      := mon_rassociator _ _ _
         · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity _)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y.

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· internal_transpose
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor y₁) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· internal_transpose
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor y₂)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· internal_transpose
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor y₁) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· internal_transpose
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor y₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
       (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
          (Q z y₁)
        · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
        · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
       (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
          (Q z y₂)
        · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
        · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧),
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
           (Q z y₁)
         · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
 · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
 · identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
           (Q z y₂)
         · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
           (Q z y₁)
         · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
 · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
 · identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
           (Q z y₂)
         · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
       (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
          (Q z y₁)
        · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
        · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
       (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
          (Q z y₂)
        · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
        · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
           (Q z y₁)
         · (rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁)))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (internal_lam
           (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
              (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                 (P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₂)
               · (rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
                  #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
                  · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂
                      y₂)))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
        (Q z y₁)
      · (rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁))) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
              (Q z y₂)
            · (rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂)))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
        (Q z y₁)
      · (rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁))) = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
              (Q z y₂)
            · (rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂)))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
        (Q z y₁)
      · (rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁))) = 
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ h = ?y'

        apply tensor_split.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) #⊗ h
· (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
        (Q z y₁)
      · (rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁))) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
              (Q z y₂)
            · (rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂)))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
              (Q z y₂)
            · (rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂))))) =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) #⊗ h
· (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
        (Q z y₁)
      · (rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁)))

(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
              (Q z y₂)
            · (rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂))))) =
?b

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

a: V

· (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
        (Q z y₁)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
              (Q z y₂)
            · (rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ h = ?y'

        apply tensor_split.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
              (Q z y₂)
            · (rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂))))) =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) #⊗ h
· (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
        (Q z y₁)
      · (rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) #⊗ h
· (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
        (Q z y₁)
      · (rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁))) =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
              (Q z y₂)
            · (rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂)))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) #⊗ h
· ((lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
           (Q z y₁)
         · (rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁)))) =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) #⊗ h
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
    #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (Q z y₁) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · ((identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
              (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                 (P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₂)
               · (rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
                  #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
                  · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂
                      y₂))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
        (Q z y₁)
      · (rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁))) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
              (Q z y₂)
            · (rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂)))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
        (Q z y₁)
      · (rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁))) = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
              (Q z y₂)
            · (rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂)))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
        (Q z y₁)
      · (rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁))) = 
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁) (Q z y₁)
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁ = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁) (Q z y₁)
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁ = ?b

h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
        (Q z y₁)
      · (rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁))) = 
?b

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁) (Q z y₁)
   · (rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁)) = ?t2

#⊗ (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁) (Q z y₁)

  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)

· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   (P y₂ x₁)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
 · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₁)
 · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
 · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
      · ((identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₁)))) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
      · ((identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₂)
              (Q z y₁)
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (P y₂ x₂ ⊗ Q z y₁)
            · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁)
                (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · identity (P y₂ x₂)
              #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) · rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂)))) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
      · ((identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₂)
              (Q z y₁)
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                (P y₂ x₂ ⊗ Q z y₁)
            · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁)
                (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · (identity (P y₂ x₂)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
                    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               · identity (P y₂ x₂)
                 #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂)))) =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
         #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
            #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
            · ((identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂)
               #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
               · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                    (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁)
                  · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                      (P y₂ x₂ ⊗ Q z y₁)
                  · mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁)
                      (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                  · (identity (P y₂ x₂)
                     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
                          (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                     · identity (P y₂ x₂)
                       #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
                  · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂
                      y₂)))))) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
              (Q z y₂)
            · (rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂)))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂ ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x₂)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x₂) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂ =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₂)
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂ ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x₂)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x₂) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₂)
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂ ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x₂)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x₂) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₂)
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂ ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x₂)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x₂) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
         #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
            #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
            · ((identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂)
               #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
               · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                    (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁)
                  · (sym_mon_braiding V
                       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                       (P y₂ x₂ ⊗ Q z y₁)
                     · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₂)
                          (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                        · (identity (P y₂ x₂)
                           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                                (Q z y₁)
                                (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                           · identity (P y₂ x₂)
                             #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))))))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P y₂ x₂ ⊗ Q z y₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         · (identity (P y₂ x₂)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            · identity (P y₂ x₂) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)))) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂ ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x₂)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x₂) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ = ?t2

· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))

  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₂) (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x₂)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x₂) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
  (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
  #⊗ (identity (Q z y₁) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
· identity (P y₂ x₂)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y₂ x₂) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ = ?t2

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
  (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
   #⊗ (identity (Q z y₁) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y₂ x₂)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · identity (P y₂ x₂) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)) = 
?t2

#⊗ (identity (Q z y₁) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
· (identity (P y₂ x₂)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y₂ x₂) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂) = ?t2

#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ = ?t2

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
         #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
            #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
            · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁
                     ⊗ Q z y₁)
                  · (mon_lassociator
                       ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
                       (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                     · (identity
                          ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
                        #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
                             (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                        · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
                          #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)))))))) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₂)
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₂)
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
         #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
            #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
            · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁
                     ⊗ Q z y₁)
                  · (mon_lassociator
                       ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
                       (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                     · (identity
                          ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
                        #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
                             (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                        · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
                          #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₂)
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
         #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
            #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
            · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁
                     ⊗ Q z y₁)
                  · (mon_lassociator
                       ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
                       (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                     · (identity
                          ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
                        #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
                             (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                        · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
                          #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₂)
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · ((identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
              (Q z y₂)
            · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
        (Q z y₂)
      · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂))) = 
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₂)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₂)
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₁))
  (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₂)
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₁))
  (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
        (Q z y₂)
      · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂))) = 
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₂)
   · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₂)
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
  #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₁)
· ((identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
   #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
   · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
#⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
#⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V
        (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₁))
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
           ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₁)
         · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))) =
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
         #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
            #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
            · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁
                     ⊗ Q z y₁)
                  · (mon_lassociator
                       ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
                       (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                     · (identity
                          ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
                        #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁)
                             (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                        · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
                          #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₁))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₁)
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ =
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
 #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₁))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z y₁) =
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
∏ o : V,
(sym_mon_braiding V o (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) o (Q z y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y₂ x₁ ⊗ (o ⊗ Q z y₁))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
    (o ⊗ Q z y₁) =
sym_mon_braiding V (o ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
  (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (o ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
    (Q z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) o (P y₂ x₁)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) o
   #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)) #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator o (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator o ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
    (Q z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V o
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁ ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) (Q z y₁)
    o
· identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) o

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
∏ o o0 : V,
(sym_mon_braiding V o0 o #⊗ identity (Q z y₁))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator o o0 (Q z y₁)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (o ⊗ (o0 ⊗ Q z y₁))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) o (o0 ⊗ Q z y₁) =
sym_mon_braiding V (o0 ⊗ o ⊗ Q z y₁) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (o0 ⊗ o) (Q z y₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) o0 o
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) o0 #⊗ identity o)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator o0 (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) o
  #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator o0 ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ o) (Q z y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V o0 ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ o ⊗ Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ o) (Q z y₁) o0
· identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ o)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y₁) o0

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
∏ o o0 o1 : V,
(sym_mon_braiding V o1 o0 #⊗ identity o)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator o0 o1 o #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (o0 ⊗ (o1 ⊗ o)) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) o0 (o1 ⊗ o) =
sym_mon_braiding V (o1 ⊗ o0 ⊗ o) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (o1 ⊗ o0) o
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) o1 o0 #⊗ identity o
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) o1
   #⊗ identity o0) #⊗ identity o
· mon_lassociator o1 (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) o0 #⊗ identity o
· mon_lassociator o1 ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ o0) o
· sym_mon_braiding V o1 ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ o0 ⊗ o)
· mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ o0) o o1
· identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ o0)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V o o1

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
∏ o o0 o1 o2 : V,
(sym_mon_braiding V o2 o1 #⊗ identity o0)
#⊗ identity o · mon_lassociator o1 o2 o0 #⊗ identity o
· sym_mon_braiding V (o1 ⊗ (o2 ⊗ o0)) o
· mon_rassociator o o1 (o2 ⊗ o0) =
sym_mon_braiding V (o2 ⊗ o1 ⊗ o0) o
· mon_rassociator o (o2 ⊗ o1) o0
· mon_rassociator o o2 o1 #⊗ identity o0
· (sym_mon_braiding V o o2 #⊗ identity o1)
  #⊗ identity o0
· mon_lassociator o2 o o1 #⊗ identity o0
· mon_lassociator o2 (o ⊗ o1) o0
· sym_mon_braiding V o2 (o ⊗ o1 ⊗ o0)
· mon_lassociator (o ⊗ o1) o0 o2
· identity (o ⊗ o1) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V o0 o2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
#⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₃ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ v₂)) v₁
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂) v₁
· mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃)
  #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_lassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₄
· identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
#⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₃ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ v₂)) v₁
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂) v₁
· mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃)
  #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_lassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₄
· identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
#⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₃ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ v₂)) v₁
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
#⊗ identity v₁
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V (v₃ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ v₂)) v₁ = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
#⊗ identity v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ #⊗ identity v₁
   · sym_mon_braiding V (v₃ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ v₂)) v₁) = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
#⊗ identity v₁
· (sym_mon_braiding V (v₃ ⊗ v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁
   · identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂) = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
#⊗ identity v₁ · sym_mon_braiding V (v₃ ⊗ v₄ ⊗ v₂) v₁
· identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂) v₁
· identity v₁
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
· identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂) v₁
· identity v₁
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
· identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂) v₁
· mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃)
  #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_lassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₄
· identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂) v₁
· (identity v₁
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
   · (identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂
      · mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (v₄ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂) v₁
· (mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
   · (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃)
         #⊗ identity v₂
         · (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
            · (mon_lassociator v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂
               · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂)
                  · (mon_lassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₄
                     · identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃)
                       #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄)))))))

identity v₁
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
· (identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂
   · mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂)) =
mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂

      · (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
         · (mon_lassociator v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂)
               · (mon_lassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₄
                  · identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃)
                    #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄))))))

· (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
   · ((sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃)

      · (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂

                  · identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃)
                    #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄)))))) =
identity v₁
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
· (identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂
   · mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂))

· (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
   · ((sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃)
      #⊗ identity v₂

               · (mon_lassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₄
                  · identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃)
                    #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄)))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
?b =
identity v₁
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
· (identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂
   · mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂))

· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃)
  #⊗ identity v₂

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂ = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ v₁ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)),
         v₁ ⊗ v₄ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂ ⟧,
   identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂ · z)
  mon_rassociator_rassociator: (λ z : V ⟦ v₁ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)),
       v₁ ⊗ v₄ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂ ⟧,
 identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂ · z)
  (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
   · mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₄) v₃ v₂) =
(λ z : V ⟦ v₁ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)),
       v₁ ⊗ v₄ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂ ⟧,
 identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂ · z)
  (identity v₁ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
   · mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
   · mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂ = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ v₁ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)),
         v₁ ⊗ v₄ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂ ⟧,
   identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂ · z)
  mon_rassociator_rassociator: identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
   · mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₄) v₃ v₂) =
identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· (identity v₁ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
   · mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
   · mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂ = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p: identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₄) v₃ v₂ =
identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· identity v₁ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂ = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p: identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₄) v₃ v₂ =
identity v₁
#⊗ (mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
    · mon_rassociator v₄ v₃ v₂)
· mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂ = ?y'

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧

p: identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₄) v₃ v₂ =
identity v₁ #⊗ identity (v₄ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂ = ?y'

· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₄) v₃ v₂ =
identity (v₁ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂))
· mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category

h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧

p: identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₄) v₃ v₂ =
mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
mon_rassociator v₁ (v₄ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂ = ?y'

        exact (!p).

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧

· mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₄) v₃ v₂
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃)
  #⊗ identity v₂

#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
· (identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂
   · mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂))

· (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
   · (mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₄) v₃ v₂
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃)
         #⊗ identity v₂
         · (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
            · (mon_lassociator v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂
               · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂)
                  · (mon_lassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₄
                     · identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃)
                       #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄))))))) =
identity v₁
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
· (identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂
   · mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
   · (mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₄) v₃ v₂
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃)
         #⊗ identity v₂
         · (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
            · (mon_lassociator v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂
               · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂)
                  · (mon_lassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₄
                     · identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃)
                       #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄))))))) =
?b

   · mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂))

h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧

identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
   · (mon_rassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₄) v₃ v₂
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ #⊗ identity v₃)
         #⊗ identity v₂
         · (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
            · (mon_lassociator v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· (mon_lassociator v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂)
      · (mon_lassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₄
         · identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃)
           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄))) = ?t2

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_lassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₄
· identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄ = 
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
