x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ v₄ ⊗ v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂,
         v₄ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)) ⟧,
   z · identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₂)
  mon_lassociator_lassociator: (λ z : V ⟦ v₄ ⊗ v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂,
       v₄ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)) ⟧,
 z · identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₂)
  (mon_lassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₂
   · mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)) =
(λ z : V ⟦ v₄ ⊗ v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂,
       v₄ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)) ⟧,
 z · identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₂)
  (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
   · mon_lassociator v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂
   · identity v₄ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂)
mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ v₄ ⊗ v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂,
         v₄ ⊗ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)) ⟧,
   z · identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₂)
  mon_lassociator_lassociator: mon_lassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₂
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₂ =
mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂
· identity v₄ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂
· identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₂
mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ = ?y'

· (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
   · identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₂) =
mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· (mon_lassociator v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂
   · (identity v₄ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂
      · identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₂))

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄
#⊗ (identity v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
· mon_rassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₂
· mon_lassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₂
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_lassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₄
· identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄ = 
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧

sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄
#⊗ (identity v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
· (mon_rassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₂
   · (mon_lassociator (v₄ ⊗ v₁) v₃ v₂
      · (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
         · (identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂)
               · (mon_lassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₄
                  · identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃)
                    #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄)))))) =
?t2

identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄
      #⊗ (identity v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
      · (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)

         · mon_lassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₄
         · identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃)
           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄))) =
identity v₁
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
· (identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂
   · mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ (v₄ ⊗ v₂))

identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄
      #⊗ (identity v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
      · (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
         · (identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂)
               · (mon_lassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₄
                  · (mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₄)
                     · identity v₁
                       #⊗ (identity v₃
                           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄)))))))) =
identity v₁
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
    · mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· (mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄
      #⊗ (identity v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
      · (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
         · (identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂)
               · (mon_lassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₄
                  · (mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₄)
                     · identity v₁
                       #⊗ (identity v₃
                           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄)))))))) =
?b

#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
    · mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂)

mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄
   #⊗ (identity v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
   · (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
      · (identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂)

· sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄
  #⊗ (identity v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· identity v₄ #⊗ mon_rassociator v₁ v₃ v₂

· mon_lassociator (v₁ ⊗ v₃) v₂ v₄
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ (v₂ ⊗ v₄)
· identity v₁
  #⊗ (identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄) = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄
   #⊗ (identity v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
   · (mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₂))
         · (mon_lassociator v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂) v₄
            · identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₃ v₂ v₄)))) =
?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_rassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄
  #⊗ (identity v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₂))
· mon_lassociator v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂) v₄
· identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₃ v₂ v₄ = ?y'

h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧

· sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄
  #⊗ (identity v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
· mon_lassociator v₄ v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₁ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₂))
· mon_lassociator v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂) v₄ = ?y'

· mon_lassociator v₁ (v₃ ⊗ v₂) v₄ = ?t2

          apply sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator.

   #⊗ (identity v₃ #⊗ identity v₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁ #⊗ identity (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
      · mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
      · identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂))) =
?y'

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₄ · sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₁)
#⊗ identity (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂) =

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧

identity (v₁ ⊗ v₄ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₂))
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂) =

· identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂) = 
?t2

          apply idpath.

· (mon_lassociator v₁ v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
   · identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)) =

y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧

V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity (v₁ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)))
· identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂) = 
?y'

        apply id_left.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· (identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
   · identity v₁ #⊗ mon_lassociator v₃ v₂ v₄
   · identity v₁
     #⊗ (identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄)) =
identity v₁
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
    · mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
identity v₁
#⊗ (mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
    · (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
       · mon_lassociator v₃ v₂ v₄
       · identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄)) =
identity v₁
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
    · mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
   · mon_lassociator v₃ v₂ v₄
   · identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃

y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₂, v₃, v₄: V
mon_lassociator v₄ v₃ v₂
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
   · mon_lassociator v₃ v₂ v₄
   · identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂

· sym_mon_braiding V v₄ (v₃ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₂ v₄
· identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄ =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂
· identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂
· identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄ =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂
   · (identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂
      · identity v₃ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄)) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂
   · identity v₃
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₂
         · sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₄)) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂
   · identity v₃ #⊗ identity (v₄ ⊗ v₂)) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂
   · identity (v₃ ⊗ (v₄ ⊗ v₂))) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
v₂, v₃, v₄: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂ =
sym_mon_braiding V v₄ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₄ v₂

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁,
(E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂ ⟧

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
V ⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁,
(E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂ ⟧

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
V ⟦ P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y,
(E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂ ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁) · ?fs y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂ · ?fs y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
V ⟦ P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y,
(E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂ ⟧
 exact (λ y, internal_transpose (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor y)).
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ #⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· (λ y : C₂,
   internal_transpose
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor y)) y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
#⊗ identity (Q z y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (Q z y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x₁) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y₁ y₂
· (λ y : C₂,
   internal_transpose
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor y)) y₂
 exact comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_eq.
    Defined.

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor y

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
 · from_comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁
     (λ y : C₂,
      internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor y))
     comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_eq)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor y =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor y

      apply idpath.
    Qed.
  End RightAction.

  (** * 5. The data *)
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₃

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₃

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
C₃ → C₁ → V
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₃) (y : C₁),
V ⟦ (E₃ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ ?P x₁ y, ?P x₂ y ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
∏ (x : C₃) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
V ⟦ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ ?P x y₁, ?P x y₂ ⟧

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
C₃ → C₁ → V
 exact comp_enriched_profunctor_ob.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₃) (y : C₁),
V
⟦ (E₃ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob x₁ y,
comp_enriched_profunctor_ob x₂ y ⟧
 exact (λ z₁ z₂ x,
             (identity _ #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x)
             · sym_mon_braiding _ _ _
             · internal_eval _ _).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
∏ (x : C₃) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
V
⟦ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob x y₁,
comp_enriched_profunctor_ob x y₂ ⟧
 exact (λ z x₁ x₂,
             (identity _ #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂)
             · sym_mon_braiding _ _ _
             · internal_eval _ _).
  Defined.

  (** * 6. The laws *)
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
enriched_profunctor_laws comp_enriched_profunctor_data

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
enriched_profunctor_laws comp_enriched_profunctor_data

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
∏ (x : C₃) (y : C₁),
enriched_id E₃ x
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y)
· lmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x x y =
mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y)
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
∏ (x : C₃) (y : C₁),
enriched_id E₁ y
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y)
· rmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y y =
mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y)
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
∏ (x₁ x₂ x₃ : C₃) (y : C₁),
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₃ x₃ x₂ x₁)
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ y)
· lmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ x₃ y =
mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ y)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₂ x₃ y
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
∏ (x : C₃) (y₁ y₂ y₃ : C₁),
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y₁)
· rmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y₁ y₃ =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y₂ y₃
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₃) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₂ y₁ y₂ =
mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ x₂ y₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
∏ (x : C₃) (y : C₁),
enriched_id E₃ x
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y)
· lmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x x y =
mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y)
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_id E₃ z
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z z x
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
       ((E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)) =
mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
internal_transpose
  (enriched_id E₃ z
   #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
   · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z z x
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x))) =
internal_transpose
  (mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x))

  (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) I_{ V}
   · (enriched_id E₃ z
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z z x

              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
         · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)

  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
· enriched_id E₃ z
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) = 
?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
enriched_id E₃ z #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y =
?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
enriched_id E₃ z #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
enriched_id E₃ z #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z z x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄) ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
· mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
enriched_id E₃ z #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
   · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z z x
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
         · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)))) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
· mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

         · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)

#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z z x)

a: V

sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z z x)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) = ?t2

· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z z x)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)) = ?t2

x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V

(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z z x)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) = ?t2

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z z x y = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
enriched_id E₃ z #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z z x y)) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
· mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
enriched_id E₃ z #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
           (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
         · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y)
             (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
         · identity (P y x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄) · lmap_e Q z z y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y))) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
· mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
           (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
         · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y)
             (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
         · identity (P y x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄) · lmap_e Q z z y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y))) =
mon_lunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y

· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y =
mon_lunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y

· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z z y) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
enriched_id E₃ z #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
         · lmap_e Q z z y)) =
mon_lunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y)

· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
         · lmap_e Q z z y)) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
?b = mon_lunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y)

sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· identity (P y x ⊗ Q z y) #⊗ enriched_id E₃ z
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z z y) = ?b

sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· (identity (P y x ⊗ Q z y) #⊗ enriched_id E₃ z
   · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)

· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)

mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y) I_{ V}
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (Q z y) #⊗ enriched_id E₃ z)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z z y) = ?t2

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y) I_{ V}
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ (identity (Q z y) #⊗ enriched_id E₃ z)
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
         · lmap_e Q z z y)) = ?t2

identity (P y x)
#⊗ (identity (Q z y) #⊗ enriched_id E₃ z)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z z y) = ?t2

#⊗ (identity (Q z y) #⊗ enriched_id E₃ z
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
       · lmap_e Q z z y)) = ?t2

· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y) (E₃ ⦃ z, z ⦄)
   · lmap_e Q z z y) = ?t2

a: V

sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y) I_{ V}
· enriched_id E₃ z #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· lmap_e Q z z y = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

a: V

   · lmap_e Q z z y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y) I_{ V}
· mon_lunitor (Q z y) = ?t2

        apply sym_mon_braiding_lunitor.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y) I_{ V}
   · identity (P y x) #⊗ mon_runitor (Q z y)) =
mon_lunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y) I_{ V}
   · (mon_rassociator (P y x) (Q z y) I_{ V}
      · mon_runitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y))) =
mon_lunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y)

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y) I_{ V}
   · (mon_rassociator (P y x) (Q z y) I_{ V}
      · mon_runitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y))) = ?b

h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
?b = mon_lunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y)

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧

   · (mon_rassociator (P y x) (Q z y) I_{ V}
      · mon_runitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y))) = ?b

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y) I_{ V}
· (mon_rassociator (P y x) (Q z y) I_{ V}
   · mon_runitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y) I_{ V}
· mon_rassociator (P y x) (Q z y) I_{ V}
· mon_runitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
identity (P y x ⊗ Q z y ⊗ I_{ V})
· mon_runitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y) = ?t2

        apply id_left.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· mon_runitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y) =
mon_lunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y)

      apply sym_mon_braiding_runitor.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
∏ (x : C₃) (y : C₁),
enriched_id E₁ y
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y)
· rmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y y =
mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y)
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_id E₁ x
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x x
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
       ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)) =
mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
internal_transpose
  (enriched_id E₁ x
   #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x x
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
          ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x))) =
internal_transpose
  (mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) I_{ V}
   · (enriched_id E₁ x
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x x
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
             ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)))) =
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) I_{ V}
   · mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) I_{ V}
     · (enriched_id E₁ x
        #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
        · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x x
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
               ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
           · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) I_{ V}
     · mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) I_{ V}
     · (enriched_id E₁ x
        #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
        · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x x
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
               ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
           · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) I_{ V}
     · mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x))

(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) I_{ V}
      · (enriched_id E₁ x
         #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x x
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
                ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
                 ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)))))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval I_{ V}
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) =

        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) I_{ V}
      · mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)))

    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

· (sym_mon_braiding V

   · (enriched_id E₁ x
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
    I_{ V}
· enriched_id E₁ x
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) =

· sym_mon_braiding V (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
    I_{ V}
· mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z y) a
· h #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
· enriched_id E₁ x
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z y) a
· h #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
· mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

· (h #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
   · (enriched_id E₁ x
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

   · mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x))

   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x x
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
           ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)))) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
· mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x x
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
           ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)
         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)))) = 
?b

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
?b =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
· mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x x

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x x)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) = ?t2

sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x x)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)) = ?t2

 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x x)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)

    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x) = ?t2

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x x y = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x x y)) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
· mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x) (Q z y)
         · rmap_e P y x x #⊗ identity (Q z y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y))) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y
· mon_lunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x)

· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x) (Q z y)
         · rmap_e P y x x #⊗ identity (Q z y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y))) =

· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x y

· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x) (Q z y)

#⊗ (identity (P y x) #⊗ identity (Q z y))

· (enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x))
  #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· rmap_e P y x x #⊗ identity (Q z y) = ?b

h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y x) (Q z y)
· ((enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x))
   #⊗ identity (Q z y)
   · rmap_e P y x x #⊗ identity (Q z y)) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
(enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x))
#⊗ identity (Q z y)
· rmap_e P y x x #⊗ identity (Q z y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
(enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x) · rmap_e P y x x)
#⊗ identity (Q z y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
mon_lunitor (P y x) #⊗ identity (Q z y) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y x) (Q z y)
· mon_lunitor (P y x) #⊗ identity (Q z y) =
mon_lunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y x) (Q z y)
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (P y x) (Q z y)
   · mon_lunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y)) =
mon_lunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y x) (Q z y)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (P y x) (Q z y)
· mon_lunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y) =
mon_lunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, I_{ V} ⟧
identity (I_{ V} ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z y))
· mon_lunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y) =
mon_lunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z y)

      apply id_left.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
∏ (x₁ x₂ x₃ : C₃) (y : C₁),
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₃ x₃ x₂ x₁)
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ y)
· lmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ x₃ y =
mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ y)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₂ x₃ y
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
       ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)) =
mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x))
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
internal_transpose
  ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)
   #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
   · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))) =
internal_transpose
  (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
   · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
         · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x))
   · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
· internal_transpose
    ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)
     #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
            ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
        · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
· internal_transpose
    (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
           · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x))
     · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
        · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)))

· internal_transpose

        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)
     #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)

        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)

       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)

           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
           · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

     · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
∏ (a : V)
(h : V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
 · internal_transpose
     ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
             ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
         · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
 · internal_transpose
     (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
            · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x))
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
             ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
         · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
 · internal_transpose
     ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
             ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
         · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
 · internal_transpose
     (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
            · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x))
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
             ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
         · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁
       #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
            ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
        · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)))
  #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
           · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x))
     · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
        · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)))
  #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y #⊗ h
· (internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)))))
   #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y #⊗ h
· (internal_transpose
     (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
                · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)))))
   #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
         · (enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁
            #⊗ identity
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
            · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃
                    x
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                    ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃
                         x)
                  · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃
                         x))))))
   #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
      · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂
                     x
                · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x)
                   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x)))
            · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃
                    x
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                    ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃
                         x)
                  · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃
                         x))))))
   #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))

· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
  #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)))))) =
identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
  #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
                · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))))))

   #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

         #⊗ identity

            #⊗ identity

            · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃
                    x

                    ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃
                         x)

                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃
                         x))))))) =
identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
   #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

            #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂
                     x
                · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x)
                   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x)))
            · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃
                    x
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x

                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)

               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)))))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
                · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
                · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)))))) =
?b

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
· enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
· enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) = ?b

?t2

x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) = ?t2

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) = ?t2

sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₃ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)) = ?t2

sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₁ z₃ x y) =
?t2

sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₁ z₃ x y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₁ z₃ x y = ?t2

        apply id_left.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁
      #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₁ z₃ x y)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
                · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁
      #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₁ z₃ x y)) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
                · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))))))

sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁
      #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₁ z₃ x y)) =
?b

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)
#⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)
#⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
         · lmap_e Q z₁ z₃ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y) = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)
#⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
