Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
         · lmap_e Q z₁ z₃ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity
  (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y
   ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
· identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?b

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(identity (P y x) #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y))
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?b

  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

   · (identity (P y x)

          · lmap_e Q z₁ z₃ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y)) = ?b

identity (P y x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
      ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)

      ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) · enriched_comp E₃ z₃ z₂ z₁)
       #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y) · lmap_e Q z₁ z₃ y))

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      (Q z₁ y)
    · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
    · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      (Q z₁ y)
    · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
       · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (Q z₁ y)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
      · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y x)
      #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
                · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
                · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)))))) =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y x)
      #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
                · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y x)
      #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
                · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x))
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x))
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) = ?b

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
                · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
   · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
             · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)))
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
              ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
            · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))))) =
?t2

    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)

· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)

h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)

           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x))
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) = ?t2

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x))
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y)
   · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x
          · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
             · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)))
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
              ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)
            · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))))) =
?t2

#⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y)

       #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x

             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)))) =

· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · identity (P y x)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · identity (P y x)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y))
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · identity (P y x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)))
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x))) = ?t2

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x)) = ?t2

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) = ?t2

x: C₁

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₃ x)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₃ x) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₂ z₃ x y = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
               (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             · identity (P y x)
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)))
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₂ z₃
                x y)))) =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y x)
      #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
               (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             · identity (P y x)
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)))
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                 (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
               · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y)
                   (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
               · identity (P y x)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                     · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))))) =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y x)
      #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
               (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             · identity (P y x)
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)))
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                 (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
               · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y)
                   (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
               · identity (P y x)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                     · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y x)
      #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
               (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             · identity (P y x)
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)))
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                 (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
               · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y)
                   (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
               · identity (P y x)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                     · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
               (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             · identity (P y x)
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)))
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · identity (P y x)
              #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y)
                    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y)))) =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y x)
      #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
               (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             · identity (P y x)
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)))
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · identity (P y x)
              #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y)
                    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y)))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y x)
      #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
               (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             · identity (P y x)
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)))
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · identity (P y x)
              #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y)
                    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y)))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · identity (P y x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)))
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · identity (P y x)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y))
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y))
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

a: V

(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· ((identity (P y x)
    #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y))
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (P y x)
         #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y)
               (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))) = 
?t2

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(identity (P y x)
 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   · (identity (P y x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y)) = ?t2

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(identity (P y x)
 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
       #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y)) = ?t2

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y) = ?t2

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y))

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ ((sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)) = ?y'

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
