y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· (lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)) =
?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y) =
?y'

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x)
              (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
              (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · (identity (P y x)
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                   · (sym_mon_braiding V
                        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                      · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                        #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
                   · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))))) =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y x)
      #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x)
              (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
              (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · (identity (P y x)
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                   · (sym_mon_braiding V
                        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                      · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                        #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
                   · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y x)
      #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x)
              (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
              (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · (identity (P y x)
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                   · (sym_mon_braiding V
                        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                      · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                        #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
                   · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
    · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    · sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
    · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    · sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
· identity (P y x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    · sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
   · (identity (P y x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
· (identity (P y x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
· identity (P y x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
    · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x)
              (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
              (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · (identity (P y x)
               #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                   · sym_mon_braiding V
                       ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
               · (identity (P y x)
                  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                      #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
                      · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
                  · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y)))))) =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y x)
      #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
      · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
       ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
      · lmap_e Q z₂ z₃ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₃ x y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)) =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
       ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)) =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
       ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)) =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
       ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
       ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
       ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y x)
                 (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y x)
                  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
                  · identity (P y x)
                    #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                         ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                         (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))))))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y x)
                 (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
               · identity (P y x)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                     · sym_mon_braiding V
                         ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                         (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))))))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y x)
                 (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
               · identity (P y x)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
                       (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                     · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                       #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                            (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))))))) = 
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y x)
                 (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
               · (identity (P y x)
                  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                       (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                  · identity (P y x)
                    #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                        #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                             (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) =
?b

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
       ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
       ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
       ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
       ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
      · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
      ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (Q z₁ y)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (Q z₁ y)
    · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (Q z₁ y)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
            (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             · (mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
                · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)))))) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
            (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             · identity
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
                  ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)))))) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
            (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity
    (P y x
     ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ identity
       ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
      · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
          (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
      · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
          (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
      · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
          (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
        (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
     (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
          (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · mon_lassociator (P y x)
                (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · mon_lassociator (P y x)
                (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
     #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (Q z₁ y)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
              (Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · (mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · (identity (Q z₁ y)
                  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  · mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y)
                      (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))))))) =
?t2

  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

              (Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · (mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · (identity (Q z₁ y)
                  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V

                  · mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y)
                      (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))))))) =
?b

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧

· mon_rassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?t20

identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?t20

#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

· mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?t20

          apply idpath.

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · identity (Q z₁ y)
        #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
             (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))) = ?t2

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

   · mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (Q z₁ y)

       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?t20

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (Q z₁ y))
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
