V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?t20

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?t20

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?t20

          apply idpath.
        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (Q z₁ y)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity
  (Q z₁ y ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
· identity (Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
identity (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · mon_lassociator (P y x)
                (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y)
       #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · mon_lassociator (P y x)
                (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity
    (P y x
     ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ identity
       (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
      · mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y x)
                 (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
               · identity (P y x)
                 #⊗ mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y)
                      (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
     (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
                ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)))))) =
mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
            · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
                ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)))))) =
(identity (P y x) #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y))
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)) =
(identity (P y x) #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y))
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₁ y)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) =
(identity (P y x) #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y))
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) =
identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₁ y)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      (** This makes the goal more readable *)
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
∏ o o0 o1 : V,
sym_mon_braiding V o (o0 ⊗ o1)
· mon_lassociator o0 o1 o
· sym_mon_braiding V o0 (o1 ⊗ o)
· sym_mon_braiding V o1 o #⊗ identity o0
· mon_lassociator o o1 o0 =
identity o #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V o0 o1

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ (v₂ ⊗ v₃)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂ =
identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
· sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
· mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁ · mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂ =
identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
· sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
· mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁ · mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂ =
identity (v₁ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₃))
· identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
· sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
· mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁ · mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂ =
mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ · mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
· identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
   · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
      · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
         · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
            · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
               · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
                  · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁
                     #⊗ identity v₂
                     · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂))))))) =
mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
   · identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
            · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁
                  #⊗ identity v₂
                  · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂)))))) =
mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
· identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
            · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁
                  #⊗ identity v₂
                  · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂)))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
?b =
mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
· identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
            · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁
                  #⊗ identity v₂
                  · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂)))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
         · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂))) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁ · mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
identity (v₂ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
         · sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
         · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂))) =
mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
· identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
         · sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
         · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂))) =
identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₃)
· (mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
   · identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
         · sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
         · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂))) =
identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂) #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
   · identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
         · sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
         · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂))) =
(sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ · sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁)
#⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
   · identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
         · sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
         · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂))) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
   · identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
            · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁ #⊗ identity v₃
   · (mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
      · identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
         · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂))) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
   · identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
         · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
   · identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃)

   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
         · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂))) = ?b

v₁, v₂, v₃: V

· (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
      · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂)) = ?t2

· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂ = ?t2

· sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

y: C₂
a: V

v₁, v₂, v₃: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃ · sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁)
#⊗ identity v₂ · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V

v₁, v₂, v₃: V
identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃) #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
identity (v₁ ⊗ v₃ ⊗ v₂) · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂ =
?t2

        apply id_left.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃)
   · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
   · identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂, z₃: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₃, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃)
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂ =
sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
· identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₃

      exact (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator V v₂ v₁ v₃).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
∏ (x : C₃) (y₁ y₂ y₃ : C₁),
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y₁)
· rmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y₁ y₃ =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x y₂ y₃
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
       ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂))
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
internal_transpose
  (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
   #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
          ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))) =
internal_transpose
  (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
     #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂))
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
          ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· internal_transpose
    (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
     #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
            ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· internal_transpose
    (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
           · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂))
     · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· internal_transpose
    (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
     #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
            ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· internal_transpose
    (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
           · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂))
     · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
∏ (a : V)
(h : V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
 · internal_transpose
     (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
             ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
 · internal_transpose
     (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                 ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂))
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
             ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)

(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
 · internal_transpose
     (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃

         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))

· internal_eval ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))

 · internal_transpose
     (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂

                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂))
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
             ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
     #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
            ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)))
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· internal_eval ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
           · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂))
     · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)))
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· internal_eval ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· internal_transpose
    (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
     #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
            ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)))
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· internal_eval ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃) =
identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· internal_transpose
    (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
           · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂))
     · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)))
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· internal_eval ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
   #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (internal_transpose
        (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))
      #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
      · internal_eval
          ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))) =
identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
   #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (internal_transpose
        (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁
                     x₂
                · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z
                          x₂)
                   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z
                          x₂)))
            · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂
                    x₃
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                    ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z
                         x₃)
                  · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z
                         x₃)))))
      #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
      · internal_eval
          ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)))

comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (internal_transpose
     (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)

            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))
   #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · internal_eval ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (internal_transpose
     (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)))
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)))))
   #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · internal_eval ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
      · (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)))))
   #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · internal_eval ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁
                     x₂
                · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z
                          x₂)
                   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z
                          x₂)))
            · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂
                    x₃
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                    ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z
                         x₃)
                  · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z
                         x₃))))))
   #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · internal_eval ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

y: C₂

h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
              ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)))
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
              ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)))
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))))

comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)

            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃) = ?b

· (identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))

            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))) =
?b

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
   #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)

         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)))) =
?t2

identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃)

    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)

h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)

sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₃)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₃ y) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₃ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₃ y = ?t2

        apply id_left.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
   #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₃ y) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)))
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
   #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
      · rmap_e P y x₁ x₃ #⊗ identity (Q z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)))
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃
   #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
      · rmap_e P y x₁ x₃ #⊗ identity (Q z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y)) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)))
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))))

· (mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
     (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · ((mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         (P y x₁)
       · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂

      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y)) =

#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃

                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))))

sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)))
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
     (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · ((mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         (P y x₁)
       · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
       · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y)) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
     (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · ((mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         (P y x₁)
       · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
          · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃)) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y)) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   (P y x₁)
 · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
    · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃)) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
   · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· ((identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
    · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
 · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
     (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
      · ((identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
          · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)))
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)))
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
     (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
      · ((identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
          · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)))
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
     (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
      · ((identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
          · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y)))
