E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)))
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃) = ?b

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)

         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)))
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)))))) =
?b

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    #⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
        · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂)
    · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
    · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)) = ?y'

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
    · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
       · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)) = ?y'

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
    · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
        · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂)
       #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂))) = 
?y'

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
         (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₂ y)) =
?y'

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
    · sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₂ y) =
?y'

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₂ y) =
?y'

          
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₂ y = ?y'

          apply idpath.
        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₂ y
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃) = ?t2

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₂ y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₂ y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₂ y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)) = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₂ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
 · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃) = ?t2

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
 · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃) = ?t2

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
 · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃))) = ?t2

x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃)) = ?t2

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₂ x₃)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₃) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₂ x₃ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₂) (Q z y)
   · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (Q z y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
      · ((mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
            (Q z y)
          · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z y)
              (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                 (P y x₂) (Q z y)
               · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (Q z y)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
     (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
      · ((identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
          · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₂) (Q z y)
· rmap_e P y x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
   · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₃ y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₂) (Q z y)
· rmap_e P y x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (Q z y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
   · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q z y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₂) (Q z y)
· rmap_e P y x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (Q z y) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
   · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q z y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₂) (Q z y)
· rmap_e P y x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (Q z y) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₂) (Q z y) =
?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y))
     #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₂) (Q z y) =
?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
           (Q z y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         · ((rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z y)
                 (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
               · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                   (P y x₂) (Q z y)))))) = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₂) (Q z y)) =
?t2

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₂) (Q z y) =

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₂) (Q z y) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y))
   · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y x₂) (Q z y)) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)
     #⊗ identity (Q z y)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
           (Q z y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V
              ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
              (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y)
               · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                  #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)
                 #⊗ identity (Q z y))))))
· rmap_e P y x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (Q z y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
   · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q z y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
           (Q z y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V
              ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
              (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y)
               · ((identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                   #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)
                  #⊗ identity (Q z y)
                  · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃
                    #⊗ identity (Q z y))))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
     (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
         · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q z y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
           (Q z y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V
              ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
              (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y)
               · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                  #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
                  · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃)
                 #⊗ identity (Q z y)))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
     (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
         · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q z y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
   · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q z y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
   · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (Q z y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
           (Q z y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V
              ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
              (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
     (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
           (Q z y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V
              ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
              (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
     (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y))

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
           (Q z y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V
              ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
              (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
     (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y) = ?t2

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y) = ?t2

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y)) = ?t2

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y)
· identity
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
     ⊗ Q z y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y)
· identity
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁))
  #⊗ identity (Q z y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁)
   · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P y x₁)) #⊗ identity (Q z y) = ?t2

· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)

       (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V
           ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
           (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
              (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
            · mon_rassociator
                ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
                (P y x₁) (Q z y)
            · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
                (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
              #⊗ identity (Q z y))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
     (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
      · sym_mon_braiding V
          ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
          (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄))) = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · identity
       ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        ⊗ ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)))) = 
?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· identity
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))

      apply id_right.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₃) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₂ y₁ y₂ =
mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e comp_enriched_profunctor_data x₁ x₂ y₂
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁))
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)) =
mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂))
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
internal_transpose
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
   · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
         · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁))
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))) =
internal_transpose
  (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
   · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂))
   · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
           · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁))
     · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
· internal_transpose
    (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
           · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂))
     · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
        · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
           · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁))
     · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
· internal_transpose
    (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
           · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂))
     · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
        · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
∏ (a : V)
(h : V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
 · internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
            · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁))
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
 · internal_transpose
     (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                 ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂))
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
         · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
