x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
 · internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
            · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁))
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
 · internal_transpose
     (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                 ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂))
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
         · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
           · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁))
     · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
        · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)))
  #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
           · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
           · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂))
     · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
        · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
        · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)))
  #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y #⊗ h
· (internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂
                     x₁
                · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x₁)
                   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x₁)))
            · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁
                    x₂
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂)
                  · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂))))))
   #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y #⊗ h
· (internal_transpose
     (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)))))
   #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
            · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁
                        z₂ x₁
                   · (sym_mon_braiding V
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                             z₂ x₁)
                      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                             z₂ x₁)))
               · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂
                       x₁ x₂
                  · (sym_mon_braiding V
                       (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                       ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                            z₂ x₂)
                     · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                            z₂ x₂)))))))
   #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
      · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁
                     x₂
                · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁
                          x₂)
                   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁
                          x₂)))
            · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂
                    x₂
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂)
                  · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂))))))
   #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · internal_eval ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂
                     x₁
                · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x₁)
                   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x₁)))
            · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁
                    x₂
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂)
                  · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂))))))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
  #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂
                     x₁
                · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x₁)
                   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x₁)))
            · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁
                    x₂
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂)
                  · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂))))))) =
identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
  #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
   #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
         · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
            · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁
                        z₂ x₁
                   · (sym_mon_braiding V
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                             z₂ x₁)
                      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                             z₂ x₁)))
               · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂
                       x₁ x₂
                  · (sym_mon_braiding V
                       (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                       ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                            z₂ x₂)
                     · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                            z₂ x₂)))))))) =
identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
   #⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
      · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁
                     x₂
                · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁
                          x₂)
                   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁
                          x₂)))
            · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂
                    x₂
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂)
                  · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂)))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂
                     x₁
                · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x₁)
                   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x₁)))
            · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁
                    x₂
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂)
                  · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂))))))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂
                     x₁
                · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x₁)
                   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x₁)))
            · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁
                    x₂
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂)
                  · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂))))))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂
                     x₁
                · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x₁)
                   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x₁)))
            · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁
                    x₂
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂)
                  · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂))))))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂
                     x₁
                · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x₁)
                   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                          x₁)))
            · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁
                    x₂
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂)
                  · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂
                         x₂))))))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
                · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)))
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)))))) =
?t2

y: C₂

identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

#⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· (identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
                · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)))
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                 ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
               · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)))))) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
          · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
             · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)))
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))) =
?t2

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
          · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
             · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)))
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y)

      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)

#⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y)

   #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)

          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
    · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
       · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
       · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁))
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
   · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· ((identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
    · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
       · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
          · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
             · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂))))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
 · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
       · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
          · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂))))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
 · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
       · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
          · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂))))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
 · identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
 · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 #⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
 · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁)
    #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
       · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂)))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) = ?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂)) = 
?y'

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₁)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₁)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₁ z₂ x₁ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₁
                    z₂ x₁ y
                · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁
                    x₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₁
                    z₂ x₁ y
                · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁
                    x₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₁
                    z₂ x₁ y
                · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁
                    x₂)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₁ z₂ x₁ y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₁ z₂ x₁ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₁ z₂ x₁ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₁ z₂ x₁ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · identity (P y x₁)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₁ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · identity (P y x₁)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₁ y
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · (mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · identity (P y x₁)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₁ y
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))) = 
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₁ y
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₁ y
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₁ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₂ x₁ x₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₂ y) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₂ x₁ x₂ y = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
             · (mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                · identity (P y x₁)
                  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₂ y)
                 (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₂
                   x₁ x₂ y))))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
             · (mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                · identity (P y x₁)
                  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₂ y)
                 (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₂
                   x₁ x₂ y))))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
             · (mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                · identity (P y x₁)
                  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₂ y)
                 (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₂
                   x₁ x₂ y))))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · (mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · identity (P y x₁)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₂ y)
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₂ x₁ x₂ y) =
?t2

(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · identity (P y x₁)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₂ y) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₂ x₁ x₂ y = ?t2

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y x₁)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₂ y) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₂ x₁ x₂ y = ?t2

a: V

(sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
 · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· ((identity (P y x₁)
    #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₂ y)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₂ x₁ x₂ y)) =
?t2

(identity (P y x₁)
 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₂ y)
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₂ x₁ x₂ y) =

(identity (P y x₁)
 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
 · identity (P y x₁) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₂ x₁ x₂ y) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(identity (P y x₁)
 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y x₁) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₂ y)
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₂ x₁ x₂ y) =
?t2

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y x₁ ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
  (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (P y x₁) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₂ x₁ x₂ y = ?t2

  (P y x₁ ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

#⊗ (identity (P y x₁) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₂ y)
   · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y) = ?t2

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧

· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₂ y)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y)

x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
  #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y = ?t2

mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· ((identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
   #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
   · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y)) = ?t2

(identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
#⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
· (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y) = ?t2

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
#⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
#⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
             · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · ((identity (P y x₁)
                #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
               #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V
                    (P y x₁
                     ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                       (P y x₁)
                       ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                     · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
                        #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
                        · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                            z₂ x₂ y)))))))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
             · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · ((identity (P y x₁)
                #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
               #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V
                    (P y x₁
                     ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                       (P y x₁)
                       ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                     · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
                        #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
                        · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                            z₂ x₂ y))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
             · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · ((identity (P y x₁)
                #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
               #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V
                    (P y x₁
                     ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                       (P y x₁)
                       ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                     · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
                        #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
                        · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                            z₂ x₂ y))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
             · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)))
         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                 ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
               · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
#⊗ identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂))
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂))
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?b

· (identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))

                  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
                · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

         · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂

#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)
   · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

                ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
             · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)))
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
              ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)

    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₁)

      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂))
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

#⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    #⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
        · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂)
