identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
    · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
       · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂)) = ?y'

identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
    · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₁ y
        · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z₁ x₁ x₂)
       #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x₂))) =

h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₁ x₁ x₂ y)) =
?y'

#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)

#⊗ (identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₁ x₁ x₂ y) =

identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₁ x₁ x₂ y = 
?y'

          apply idpath.

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₁ x₁ x₂ y
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₁ x₁ x₂ y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₁ x₁ x₂ y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₁ x₁ x₂ y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z₁ x₁ x₂ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
 · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₂ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
 · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y)
    · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₂ y
       · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂)))
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· ((rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y))
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₂ y
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂)
     #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· ((rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y))
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₂ y
       · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂))) = 
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x₂ y
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₁ z₂ x₂)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₁ z₂ x₂ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₂) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P y x₂)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (P y x₂) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y x₂)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (P y x₂ ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P y x₂) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y x₂)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y x₂) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y x₂)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
           (Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · ((rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y))
            #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y x₂) (Q z₁ y)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · identity (P y x₂)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
             · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · ((identity (P y x₁)
                #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
               #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V
                    (P y x₁
                     ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                       (P y x₁)
                       ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                     · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
                        #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
                        · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                            z₂ x₂ y))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
           (Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · ((rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y))
            #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y x₂) (Q z₁ y)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · identity (P y x₂)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
             · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · ((identity (P y x₁)
                #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
               #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V
                    (P y x₁
                     ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                       (P y x₁)
                       ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                     · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
                        #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
                        · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                            z₂ x₂ y))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
           (Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · ((rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y))
            #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · (mon_lassociator (P y x₂) (Q z₁ y)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · identity (P y x₂)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y))
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y x₂) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P y x₂)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z₁ y))
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y x₂) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y x₂)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
  #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x₂)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
   #⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (identity (P y x₂)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
#⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· (identity (P y x₂)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
#⊗ (identity (Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x₂)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
#⊗ identity (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity (P y x₂)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
           (Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
              (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · (identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
             · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · ((identity (P y x₁)
                #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
               #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V
                    (P y x₁
                     ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                       (P y x₁)
                       ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                     · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
                        #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
                        · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                            z₂ x₂ y))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y x₁)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ lmap_e Q z₁ z₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x₂ y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y x₁)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
           (Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
              (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            · identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
              #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                   (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
               (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
             · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · ((identity (P y x₁)
                #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
               #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V
                    (P y x₁
                     ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                      (P y x₁)
                      ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
        (Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
           (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · ((identity (P y x₁)
             #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V
                 (P y x₁ ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                 (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   (P y x₁) ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
        (Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
           (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))) =
mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · ((identity (P y x₁)
             #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V
                 (P y x₁ ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                 (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   (P y x₁) ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
        (Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
           (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))) =
mon_lassociator (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
            · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                 (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                     ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                  · ((sym_mon_braiding V
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                      · mon_lassociator (P y x₁)
                          (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                     #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     · ((identity (P y x₁)
                         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V
                              (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                        #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                        · (sym_mon_braiding V
                             (P y x₁
                              ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                                 ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                             (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                           · mon_rassociator
                               (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                               (P y x₁)
                               ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                                ⊗ Q z₁ y))))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
            · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
                    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
               #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · ((identity (P y x₁)
                   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  · (sym_mon_braiding V
                       (P y x₁
                        ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                       (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                         (P y x₁)
                         ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
            · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
                    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
               #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · ((identity (P y x₁)
                   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  · (sym_mon_braiding V
                       (P y x₁
                        ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                       (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                         (P y x₁)
                         ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)))))))) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
            · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
                    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
               #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · ((identity (P y x₁)
                   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  · (sym_mon_braiding V
                       (P y x₁
                        ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                       (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                         (P y x₁)
                         ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)))))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
            · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
                  (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
                · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
                    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
               #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · ((identity (P y x₁)
                   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
                  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  · (sym_mon_braiding V
                       (P y x₁
                        ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                       (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                     · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                         (P y x₁)
                         ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)))))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · ((identity (P y x₁)
             #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V
                 (P y x₁ ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                 (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   (P y x₁) ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)))))) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
  (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y x₁)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y x₁)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y x₁)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
           (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
         · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
             (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
        #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (P y x₁)
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
        #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V
          (P y x₁ ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
          (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
          ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · ((identity (P y x₁)
             #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V
                 (P y x₁ ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                 (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   (P y x₁) ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)))))) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · ((identity (P y x₁)
             #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V
                 (P y x₁ ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                 (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   (P y x₁) ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · ((identity (P y x₁)
             #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
            #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V
                 (P y x₁ ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
                 (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                   (P y x₁) ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(identity (P y x₁)
 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P y x₁ ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
       ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
(identity (P y x₁)
 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
  (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (P y x₁)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
  (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (P y x₁)
       #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
       ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ Q z₁ y)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
  (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
     (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V
              (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
              (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                 (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
               · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                  #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
                 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                      (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))))) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V
              (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
              (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                 (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
               · identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
                 #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y)
                      (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))))) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
    (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
    (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
    (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁
     ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
    (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
     (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
   · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
       (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
    (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
    (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
    (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
    (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · sym_mon_braiding V
             (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
             (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)))) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁)
       (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · sym_mon_braiding V
             (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
             (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)))) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) =
(mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
 · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y))
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) =
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
#⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) =
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
    (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
        (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
            (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
          · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · sym_mon_braiding V
             (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
             (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)))) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
   · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
         (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
       · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V
          (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
          (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V
          (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
          (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
           (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · sym_mon_braiding V
             (P y x₁ ⊗ (Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
             (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)))) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V
           (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
                (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
