E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V
           (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y)
                (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))) =
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) =
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_lassociator (P y x₁) (Q z₁ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) =
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
?b =
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V
          (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄))
          (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
             (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
          (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ ((E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
     (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
     (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
       (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y) =
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)
      (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
    · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)
        (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y)) =
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z₁, z₂: C₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)) =
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z₁ y ⊗ (E₃ ⦃ z₂, z₁ ⦄)))

      apply tensor_id_id.
  Qed.

  (** * 7. Composition of enriched profunctors *)
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₃
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
enriched_profunctor_laws ?P

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₃
 exact comp_enriched_profunctor_data.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
enriched_profunctor_laws comp_enriched_profunctor_data
 exact comp_enriched_profunctor_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 8. Additional laws for action on morphisms *)
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
· lmap_e_arr comp_enriched_profunctor x g =
identity (P y x) #⊗ lmap_e_arr Q y g
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
· lmap_e_arr comp_enriched_profunctor x g =
identity (P y x) #⊗ lmap_e_arr Q y g
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
· lmap_e_arr comp_enriched_profunctor x g = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
?b =
identity (P y x) #⊗ lmap_e_arr Q y g
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
· lmap_e_arr comp_enriched_profunctor x g = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
· (mon_linvunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
   · enriched_from_arr E₃ g
     #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
   · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₁ x
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
          ((E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x))) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
· mon_linvunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₃ g
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₁ x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· identity I_{ V}
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
· enriched_from_arr E₃ g
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₁ x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· (identity I_{ V}
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
   · (enriched_from_arr E₃ g
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
      · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₁ x
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
              ((E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
            · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x))))) =
?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
· (enriched_from_arr E₃ g
   #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
   · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₁ x
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
         · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)))) =
?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
· enriched_from_arr E₃ g
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₂ x)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₁ x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₃ g
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₁ x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₃ g #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₁ x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₃ g #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
   · (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₁ x
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
           ((E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
         · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)))) =
?t2

#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
· (identity (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₁ x
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
        ((E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
      · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x))) = ?t2

· identity (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₁ x

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
identity (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
    ((E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x) = ?t2

x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₂ x y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap z₂ z₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z₁ x)) = ?t2

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₂ z₁ x y) =
?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₂ z₁ x y = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
identity ((E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₂ z₁ x y = ?t2

      apply id_left.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· (enriched_from_arr E₃ g #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor z₂ z₁ x y) =
identity (P y x) #⊗ lmap_e_arr Q y g
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· (enriched_from_arr E₃ g #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
        (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
      · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y)
          (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y)
              (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄) · lmap_e Q z₂ z₁ y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y)) =
identity (P y x) #⊗ lmap_e_arr Q y g
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· enriched_from_arr E₃ g #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₂ z₁ y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y =
identity (P y x) #⊗ lmap_e_arr Q y g
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z₁ x y

z₁, z₂: C₃

· enriched_from_arr E₃ g #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)

identity (P y x) #⊗ lmap_e_arr Q y g

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· enriched_from_arr E₃ g #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
      · lmap_e Q z₂ z₁ y) =
identity (P y x)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q z₂ y)
    · enriched_from_arr E₃ g #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y)
    · lmap_e Q z₂ z₁ y)

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· enriched_from_arr E₃ g #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₂ z₁ y) =
identity (P y x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z₂ y)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₃ g #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y))
· identity (P y x) #⊗ lmap_e Q z₂ z₁ y

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category

z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· enriched_from_arr E₃ g #⊗ identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄) = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
?b =
identity (P y x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z₂ y)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₃ g #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y))

sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₃ g
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)

y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· (identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₃ g
   · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄))) =
?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
identity (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₃ g
· (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)
   · identity (P y x)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄)) =
?t2

· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄) =

· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄) =

  #⊗ (identity (Q z₂ y) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₃ g)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) (E₃ ⦃ z₁, z₂ ⦄) =

· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₃ g #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y)) =

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
   · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) I_{ V}
      · (identity (P y x)
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) I_{ V}
         · identity (P y x)
           #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₃ g
               #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y))))) =
identity (P y x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z₂ y)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₃ g #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y))

    
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) I_{ V}
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) I_{ V}
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₃ g #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y)) =
identity (P y x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z₂ y)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₃ g #⊗ identity (Q z₂ y))

· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) I_{ V}
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) I_{ V} =
identity (P y x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z₂ y)

mon_rinvunitor (P y x ⊗ Q z₂ y)
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) I_{ V}
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) I_{ V} =
identity (P y x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z₂ y)

· mon_rassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) I_{ V}
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) I_{ V} =

· (mon_rassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) I_{ V}
   · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) I_{ V}
      · identity (P y x)

· (mon_rassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) I_{ V}
   · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z₂ y) I_{ V}
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) I_{ V})) = 
?b

g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
identity (P y x ⊗ (Q z₂ y ⊗ I_{ V}))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) I_{ V} = ?t2

      apply id_left.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
identity (P y x) #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (Q z₂ y)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) I_{ V} =
identity (P y x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z₂ y)

y: C₂

identity (P y x)
#⊗ (mon_rinvunitor (Q z₂ y)
    · sym_mon_braiding V (Q z₂ y) I_{ V}) =
identity (P y x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z₂ y)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
z₁, z₂: C₃
g: C₃ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
identity (P y x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z₂ y) =
identity (P y x) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q z₂ y)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· rmap_e_arr comp_enriched_profunctor f z =
rmap_e_arr P f y #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· rmap_e_arr comp_enriched_profunctor f z =
rmap_e_arr P f y #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y

    
V: benabou_cosmos

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· rmap_e_arr comp_enriched_profunctor f z = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
?b =
rmap_e_arr P f y #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· rmap_e_arr comp_enriched_profunctor f z = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· (mon_linvunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ f
     #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂))) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· mon_linvunitor (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· identity I_{ V}
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· (identity I_{ V}
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
   · (enriched_from_arr E₁ f
      #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
            · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂))))) =
?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
identity I_{ V} #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ f
   #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
         · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)))) =
?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
identity I_{ V} #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂) = ?t2

z: C₃
enriched_from_arr E₁ f
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂) = ?t2

z: C₃
enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y

#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

z: C₃

#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂) = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂) = ?t2

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₁ y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap z x₁ x₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob z x₂)) = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₂ y) =
?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₂ y = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₂ y = ?t2

      apply id_left.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor z x₁ x₂ y) =
rmap_e_arr P f y #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
      · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y)) =
rmap_e_arr P f y #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y =
rmap_e_arr P f y #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in z x₂ y

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y) =
rmap_e_arr P f y #⊗ identity (Q z y)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y) =
(mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
 · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
 · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂) #⊗ identity (Q z y)

    
V: benabou_cosmos

z: C₃

· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y) =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
  #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ #⊗ identity (Q z y)

· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y x₁) (Q z y) =

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (P y x₁) (Q z y)
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y x₁) (Q z y) =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (P y x₁) (Q z y)
   · mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y x₁) (Q z y)) =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C₂
z: C₃
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)
· identity (I_{ V} ⊗ P y x₁ ⊗ Q z y) =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁) #⊗ identity (Q z y)

    apply id_right.
  Qed.
End Composition.
